--*************************
-- BTD Date Gen
--*************************

SELECT * INTO 
#T_CAL_BTD
FROM 

(
SELECT 
    C1.CalendarDate,
    C2.CalendarDate AS Cal_Date_PRED
FROM 
    EDW.DIM_CALENDAR C1
JOIN 
    EDW.DIM_CALENDAR C2 
    ON C2.CalendarDate BETWEEN DATEADD(DAY, -39, C1.CalendarDate) -- 27 + 13
                             AND DATEADD(DAY, -12, C1.CalendarDate)

	) A1
WHERE CalendarDate>='2019-01-01' AND CalendarDate<='2030-12-31';


--*************************
-- Cancel Date Gen
--*************************


SELECT * INTO 
#T_CAL_CANCEL
FROM 

(
SELECT 
    C1.CalendarDate,
    C2.CalendarDate AS Cal_Date_PRED
FROM 
    EDW.DIM_CALENDAR C1
JOIN 
    EDW.DIM_CALENDAR C2 
    ON C2.CalendarDate BETWEEN DATEADD(DAY, -111, C1.CalendarDate) -- ( 55 + 57 )
                             AND DATEADD(DAY, -56, C1.CalendarDate)

	) A1
WHERE CalendarDate>='2019-01-01' AND CalendarDate<='2030-12-31';



--**********************************************
--############## BTD Cal STARTS HERE ###########
--**********************************************

SELECT 
Division,
CalendarDate,
SUM(BTD_PCT_ROLLUP) AS BTD_PCT ,
SUM(BTD_AMT_PCT_ROLLUP) AS BTD_AMT_PCT
INTO #T_BTD_1

FROM 
(
		SELECT 
		Division,
		CalendarDate,
		Cal_Date_PRED,
		BTD,
		CANCELLED,
		SOLD,
		SOLD_SUM_PRED,
		SOLD_SUM_PRED_PCT,
		BTD_WGTD_PCT,
		(SOLD_SUM_PRED_PCT * BTD_WGTD_PCT ) AS BTD_PCT_ROLLUP,
		GROSS_SALES,
		GROSS_SALES_SUM_PRED,
		GROSS_SALES_SUM_PRED_PCT,
		(GROSS_SALES_SUM_PRED_PCT * BTD_AMT_WGTD_PCT ) AS BTD_AMT_PCT_ROLLUP
		
		FROM
		(
		
				SELECT 
				Division,
				CalendarDate,
				Cal_Date_PRED,
				BTD,
				CANCELLED,
				SOLD,
				SOLD_SUM_PRED,
				CASE WHEN SOLD_SUM_PRED=0	THEN 0.000 ELSE	(SOLD * 1.000 / SOLD_SUM_PRED * 1.000) END AS SOLD_SUM_PRED_PCT,
				CASE WHEN SOLD=0			THEN 0.000 ELSE  (BTD * 1.000 / SOLD * 1.000) END AS BTD_WGTD_PCT,
				GROSS_SALES_SUM_PRED,
				GROSS_SALES,
				CASE WHEN GROSS_SALES_SUM_PRED=0	THEN 0.000 ELSE	(GROSS_SALES * 1.000 / GROSS_SALES_SUM_PRED * 1.000) END AS GROSS_SALES_SUM_PRED_PCT,
				CASE WHEN GROSS_SALES=0				THEN 0.000 ELSE  (BTD_AMT * 1.000 / GROSS_SALES * 1.000) END AS BTD_AMT_WGTD_PCT
				
				
				FROM 
				(
				
					SELECT 
					Division,
					CalendarDate,
					Cal_Date_PRED,
					BTD,
					CANCELLED,
					SOLD,
					SUM(SOLD) OVER (PARTITION BY Division,CalendarDate) AS SOLD_SUM_PRED,
					BTD_AMT,
					GROSS_SALES,
					SUM(GROSS_SALES) OVER (PARTITION BY Division,CalendarDate) AS GROSS_SALES_SUM_PRED
					
					FROM 
					(
						SELECT 
						B.Division,
						A.CalendarDate,
						A.Cal_Date_PRED,
						SUM(B.BTD) 			AS BTD,
						SUM(B.CANCELLED) 	AS CANCELLED,
						SUM(B.SOLD) 		AS SOLD,
						SUM(B.BTD_AMT) 		AS BTD_AMT,
						SUM(B.GROSS_SALES) 	AS GROSS_SALES
						
						FROM #T_CAL_BTD A 
						JOIN [EDW_FCST].[FACT_SALES_ACTUAL] B
						ON A.Cal_Date_PRED = B.CalendarDate
						GROUP BY 
						B.Division,
						A.CalendarDate,
						A.Cal_Date_PRED
						
						) M1
						
					) M2
		
				) M3
		
		) M4

GROUP BY Division,
CalendarDate;


--**********************************************
--############## BTD Cal ENDS HERE ###########
--**********************************************



--****************************************
-- ######## CANCEL CAL STARTS HERE  ######
--****************************************




SELECT 
Division,
CalendarDate,
SUM(CANCEL_PCT_ROLLUP) 		AS 	CANCEL_PCT ,
SUM(CANCELLED_AMT_ROLLUP) 	AS 	CANCELLED_AMT_PCT 
INTO #T_CANCEL_1

FROM 
(
		SELECT 
		Division,
		CalendarDate,
		Cal_Date_PRED,
		BTD,
		CANCELLED,
		SOLD,
		SOLD_SUM_PRED,
		SOLD_SUM_PRED_PCT,
		CANCELLED_WGTD_PCT,
		(SOLD_SUM_PRED_PCT * CANCELLED_WGTD_PCT ) AS CANCEL_PCT_ROLLUP,
		GROSS_SALES_SUM_PRED_PCT,
		CANCELLED_AMT_WGTD_PCT,
		(GROSS_SALES_SUM_PRED_PCT * CANCELLED_AMT_WGTD_PCT ) AS CANCELLED_AMT_ROLLUP
		
		FROM
		(
		
				SELECT 
				Division,
				CalendarDate,
				Cal_Date_PRED,
				BTD,
				CANCELLED,
				SOLD,
				SOLD_SUM_PRED,
				CASE WHEN SOLD_SUM_PRED=0	THEN 0.000 ELSE	(SOLD * 1.000 / SOLD_SUM_PRED * 1.000) END AS SOLD_SUM_PRED_PCT,
				CASE WHEN SOLD=0			THEN 0.000 ELSE  (CANCELLED * 1.000 / SOLD * 1.000) END AS CANCELLED_WGTD_PCT,
				
				CASE WHEN GROSS_SALES_SUM_PRED=0	THEN 0.000 ELSE	(GROSS_SALES * 1.000 / GROSS_SALES_SUM_PRED * 1.000) END AS GROSS_SALES_SUM_PRED_PCT,
				CASE WHEN GROSS_SALES=0			THEN 0.000 ELSE  (CANCELLED_AMT * 1.000 / GROSS_SALES * 1.000) END AS CANCELLED_AMT_WGTD_PCT
				
				FROM 
				(
				
					SELECT 
					Division,
					CalendarDate,
					Cal_Date_PRED,
					BTD,
					CANCELLED,
					SOLD,
					SUM(SOLD) OVER (PARTITION BY Division,CalendarDate) AS SOLD_SUM_PRED,
					GROSS_SALES,
					CANCELLED_AMT,
					SUM(GROSS_SALES) OVER (PARTITION BY Division,CalendarDate) AS GROSS_SALES_SUM_PRED
					
					FROM 
					(
						SELECT 
						B.Division,
						A.CalendarDate,
						A.Cal_Date_PRED,
						SUM(B.BTD) 			AS BTD,
						SUM(B.CANCELLED) 	AS CANCELLED,
						SUM(B.SOLD) 		AS SOLD,
						SUM(B.CANCELLED_AMT) 	AS CANCELLED_AMT,
						SUM(B.GROSS_SALES) 		AS GROSS_SALES
						
						FROM #T_CAL_CANCEL A 
						JOIN [EDW_FCST].[FACT_SALES_ACTUAL] B
						ON A.Cal_Date_PRED = B.CalendarDate
						GROUP BY 
						B.Division,
						A.CalendarDate,
						A.Cal_Date_PRED
						) M1
						
					) M2
		
				) M3
		
		) M4

GROUP BY Division,
CalendarDate;

--****************************************
-- ######## CANCEL CAL ENDS HERE  ######
--****************************************




--*******************************************
--####### MTD ACTUALS STARTS HERE ##########
--*******************************************

SELECT 
Division,
CalendarDate,

CASE WHEN MTD_SOLD=0		THEN 0.000 ELSE (MTD_BTD * 1.000 / MTD_SOLD * 1.000)					END AS MTD_BTD_PCT_ACT,
CASE WHEN MTD_GROSS_SALES=0 THEN 0.000 ELSE (MTD_BTD_AMT * 1.000 / MTD_GROSS_SALES * 1.000) 		END AS MTD_BTD_AMT_PCT_ACT,

CASE WHEN MTD_SOLD=0 THEN 0.000			ELSE (MTD_CANCELLED * 1.000 / MTD_SOLD * 1.000)				END AS MTD_CANCEL_PCT_ACT,
CASE WHEN MTD_GROSS_SALES=0 THEN 0.000	ELSE (MTD_CANCELLED_AMT * 1.000 / MTD_GROSS_SALES * 1.000)	END AS MTD_CANCEL_AMT_PCT_ACT


INTO #T_MTD_BTD_CANCEL
FROM 
(

	SELECT 
	Division,
	EOMONTH(CalendarDate) AS CalendarDate,
	SUM(BTD) 			AS MTD_BTD,
	SUM(BTD_AMT) 		AS MTD_BTD_AMT,
	SUM(SOLD) 			AS MTD_SOLD,
	SUM(CANCELLED) 		AS MTD_CANCELLED,
	SUM(CANCELLED_AMT) 	AS MTD_CANCELLED_AMT,
	SUM(GROSS_SALES) 	AS MTD_GROSS_SALES
	FROM 			
	[EDW_FCST].[FACT_SALES_ACTUAL] 
	GROUP BY 
	Division,
	EOMONTH(CalendarDate) 
		
	) M1;
		

--*******************************************
--####### MTD END HERE ##########
--*******************************************




--***********************************************************
--######### LONG TERM CANCEL - STARTS HERE ##################
--***********************************************************



WITH CAL AS 

(
	SELECT 
		C.CalendarDate,
		D.Division
	FROM 
		EDW.DIM_CALENDAR C
	CROSS JOIN 
		(
			SELECT DISTINCT DIVISION FROM EDW.DIM_JOB_STATUS
			
			) D
			
	)


SELECT 
A.CalendarDate,
A.Division,
COALESCE(B.LT_Cancel_8WK,0)  		AS Cancel_Count_8WK ,
COALESCE(B.LT_Cancel_16WK,0) 		AS Cancel_Count_16WK,
COALESCE(B.LT_Cancel_8WK_AMT,0)  	AS Cancel_Count_8WK_AMT ,
COALESCE(B.LT_Cancel_16WK_AMT,0)  	AS Cancel_Count_16WK_AMT ,
COALESCE(C.Sold,0) 			 		AS Sold_Count,
COALESCE(C.GrossSales,0)			AS GrossSales

INTO #T_CAN_1

FROM CAL  A
LEFT JOIN	
	
(
	SELECT 
	Division,
	ContractDate,
	SUM(LT_Cancel_8Week)  AS LT_Cancel_8WK,
	SUM(LT_Cancel_16Week) AS LT_Cancel_16WK,
	SUM(LT_Cancel_8Week_AMT) 	AS LT_Cancel_8WK_AMT,
	SUM(LT_Cancel_16Week_AMT) 	AS LT_Cancel_16WK_AMT
	FROM 
	(
		
		SELECT 
		LeadID,
		JobID,
		Division,
		ContractDate,
		CancelDate,	
		CASE WHEN DAY_DIFF > 56  AND GrossSales > 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS LT_Cancel_8Week,
		CASE WHEN DAY_DIFF > 112 AND GrossSales > 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS LT_Cancel_16Week,
		CASE WHEN DAY_DIFF > 56  AND GrossSales > 0 THEN GrossSales ELSE 0 END AS LT_Cancel_8Week_AMT,
		CASE WHEN DAY_DIFF > 112 AND GrossSales > 0 THEN GrossSales ELSE 0 END AS LT_Cancel_16Week_AMT
		FROM 
		(	
			SELECT
				B.LeadID,
				B.Division,
				a.JobID,
				CAST(A.ContractDate AS DATE) AS ContractDate,
				CAST(A.CancelDate AS DATE) AS CancelDate,
				DATEDIFF(DAY,A.ContractDate,A.CancelDate) AS DAY_DIFF,
				(
					CASE 
						WHEN A.Division IN ('MXH','CTA','SWR') THEN A.GrossAmount ELSE 
							(
								CASE WHEN A.JobNetAmt>0 THEN JobNetAmt ELSE A.GrossAmount END
								) END
						) AS GrossSales
			
				FROM EDW.FACT_LEAD B
				LEFT JOIN EDW.FACT_JOB  A
				ON A.LeadID = B.LeadID
				LEFT JOIN EDW.DIM_JOB_STATUS C
				ON A.JobStatusID = C.JobStatusID
				WHERE UPPER(C.UNI_JOBSTATUSCATEGORY)='CANCELLED' 			
				AND A.CancelDate IS NOT NULL
				AND CAST(A.ContractDate AS DATE) >='2019-01-01'
				

				) M1
			
			) M2
		
		GROUP BY 
		Division,
		ContractDate
		
	) B 

ON A.CalendarDate = B.ContractDate
AND A.Division = B.Division

LEFT JOIN 
	(
		SELECT 
			CalendarDate,
			Division,
			SUM(Sold) 		AS Sold,
			SUM(Gross_Sales) AS GrossSales
			
			FROM [EDW_FCST].[FACT_SALES_ACTUAL] 
			GROUP BY 
			CalendarDate,
			Division
		
		) C

ON A.CalendarDate = C.CalendarDate
AND A.Division = C.Division
 
WHERE A.CalendarDate <= GETDATE() + 6
AND A.CalendarDate >= '2019-01-01';




--***************





SELECT 
CalendarDate,
Division,
Cancel_Count_8WK_Last12to6Months,
Cancel_Count_16WK_Last12to6Months,
Sold_Count_Last12to6Months,
CASE WHEN Sold_Count_Last12to6Months=0 THEN 0 ELSE ( Cancel_Count_8WK_Last12to6Months  * 1.0 / Sold_Count_Last12to6Months * 1.0 ) END AS Cancel_Count_8WK_AVG,
CASE WHEN Sold_Count_Last12to6Months=0 THEN 0 ELSE ( Cancel_Count_16WK_Last12to6Months * 1.0 / Sold_Count_Last12to6Months * 1.0 ) END AS Cancel_Count_16WK_AVG,

CASE WHEN GrossSales_Last12to6Months=0 THEN 0 ELSE ( Cancel_Count_8WK_Last12to6Months_AMT  * 1.0 / GrossSales_Last12to6Months * 1.0 ) END AS Cancel_Count_8WK_AVG_AMT,
CASE WHEN GrossSales_Last12to6Months=0 THEN 0 ELSE ( Cancel_Count_16WK_Last12to6Months_AMT  * 1.0 / GrossSales_Last12to6Months * 1.0 ) END AS Cancel_Count_16WK_AVG_AMT

INTO #T_LT_CANCEL

FROM 
(
	SELECT 
		A.CalendarDate,
		A.Division,
		SUM(B.Cancel_Count_8WK) 		AS Cancel_Count_8WK_Last12to6Months,
		SUM(B.Cancel_Count_16WK) 		AS Cancel_Count_16WK_Last12to6Months,
		
		SUM(B.Cancel_Count_8WK_AMT) 	AS Cancel_Count_8WK_Last12to6Months_AMT,
		SUM(B.Cancel_Count_16WK_AMT) 	AS Cancel_Count_16WK_Last12to6Months_AMT,
		
		SUM(B.Sold_Count) 				AS Sold_Count_Last12to6Months,
		SUM(B.GrossSales) 				AS GrossSales_Last12to6Months
		
	FROM #T_CAN_1 A
	LEFT JOIN #T_CAN_1 B
		ON B.Division = A.Division
		
	AND B.CalendarDate BETWEEN DATEFROMPARTS(YEAR(DATEADD(MONTH, -12, A.CalendarDate)), MONTH(DATEADD(MONTH, -12, A.CalendarDate)), 1) -- First Day of Month
							AND EOMONTH(DATEADD(MONTH, -6, A.CalendarDate))  -- Last Day of Month
	GROUP BY A.CalendarDate, A.Division
	
	) M1 

WHERE CalendarDate >= '2022-01-01'
AND CalendarDate <= GETDATE() + 6
AND CalendarDate <= EOMONTH( GETDATE());



--***********************************************************
--######### LONG TERM CANCEL - ENDS HERE ##################
--***********************************************************



--**************************************************************************************
--######### LONG TERM CANCEL ADJUSTMENT TO BTD & CANCEL - STARTS HERE ##################
--**************************************************************************************

-- LT Adjustment to Cancel

SELECT 
A.Division,
A.CalendarDate,
CASE WHEN A.Division ='RTW' THEN A.CANCEL_PCT ELSE (A.CANCEL_PCT + COALESCE(B.Cancel_Count_8Wk_AVG,0) ) END AS CANCEL_PCT,
CASE WHEN A.Division ='RTW' THEN A.CANCELLED_AMT_PCT ELSE (A.CANCELLED_AMT_PCT  + COALESCE(B.Cancel_Count_16Wk_AVG_AMT,0)) END AS CANCELLED_AMT_PCT

--(A.CANCEL_PCT + COALESCE(B.Cancel_Count_8Wk_AVG,0) ) AS CANCEL_PCT ,
--(A.CANCELLED_AMT_PCT  + COALESCE(B.Cancel_Count_16Wk_AVG_AMT,0)) AS CANCELLED_AMT_PCT
INTO #T_CANCEL_2
FROM #T_CANCEL_1 A 
LEFT JOIN #T_LT_CANCEL B 
ON A.CalendarDate = B.CalendarDate
AND A.Division = B.Division;



-- BTD and Cancel Combined 

SELECT 
A.Division,
A.CalendarDate,
A.BTD_PCT ,
A.BTD_AMT_PCT,
COALESCE(B.CANCEL_PCT,0.0000) AS CANCEL_PCT,
COALESCE(B.CANCELLED_AMT_PCT,0.0000) AS CANCELLED_AMT_PCT,

C.MTD_BTD_PCT_ACT,
C.MTD_BTD_AMT_PCT_ACT,
C.MTD_CANCEL_PCT_ACT,
C.MTD_CANCEL_AMT_PCT_ACT

INTO #T_BTD_CANCEL_COMBINED_LT_ADJUSTED

FROM #T_BTD_1 A 
LEFT JOIN #T_CANCEL_2 B 
ON A.CalendarDate = B.CalendarDate
AND A.Division = B.Division

LEFT JOIN #T_MTD_BTD_CANCEL C 
ON  EOMONTH(A.CalendarDate) 	= EOMONTH(C.CalendarDate)
AND A.Division 					= C.Division

WHERE A.CalendarDate <= GETDATE()+6
AND A.CalendarDate <= EOMONTH(GETDATE());



--**************************************************************************************
--######### LONG TERM CANCEL ADJUSTMENT TO BTD & CANCEL - STARTS HERE ##################
--**************************************************************************************


--*******************************



SELECT 
Division,
CalendarDate,
CASE WHEN BTD_IND=1 THEN MTD_BTD_PCT_ACT		ELSE BTD_PCT		END AS BTD_PCT, 
CASE WHEN BTD_IND=1 THEN MTD_BTD_AMT_PCT_ACT	ELSE BTD_AMT_PCT	END AS BTD_AMT_PCT, 

CASE WHEN CANCEL_IND=1 THEN MTD_CANCEL_PCT_ACT		ELSE CANCEL_PCT		END AS CANCEL_PCT, 
CASE WHEN CANCEL_IND=1 THEN MTD_CANCEL_AMT_PCT_ACT	ELSE CANCELLED_AMT_PCT	END AS CANCELLED_AMT_PCT

INTO #T_BTD_CANCEL_3

FROM
(
	
				SELECT 
				Division,
				CalendarDate,
				MTD_BTD_PCT_ACT,
				MTD_BTD_AMT_PCT_ACT,
				MTD_CANCEL_PCT_ACT,
				MTD_CANCEL_AMT_PCT_ACT,
				BTD_PCT,
				BTD_AMT_PCT,
				CANCEL_PCT,
				CANCELLED_AMT_PCT,
				CASE WHEN BTD_PCT < MTD_BTD_PCT_ACT AND DAY(CalendarDate) > 12 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS BTD_Ind,
				CASE WHEN CANCEL_PCT < MTD_CANCEL_PCT_ACT AND DAY(CalendarDate) > 12 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS Cancel_Ind
				FROM  #T_BTD_CANCEL_COMBINED_LT_ADJUSTED
				--WHERE CalendarDate>='2025-06-01' AND Division = 'FHI' 
				

		) M2;



--******************************


WITH M1 AS
(
	SELECT  
	Division,
	CalendarDate,
	BTD_PCT,
	BTD_AMT_PCT,
	CANCEL_PCT,
	CANCELLED_AMT_PCT
	FROM #T_BTD_CANCEL_3 
	WHERE CalendarDate=CAST(GETDATE() +1 AS DATE)

	UNION ALL

	SELECT  
	Division,
	CalendarDate,
	BTD_PCT,
	BTD_AMT_PCT,
	CANCEL_PCT,
	CANCELLED_AMT_PCT
	FROM #T_BTD_CANCEL_3 
	WHERE CalendarDate<=EOMONTH(DATEADD(MONTH,-1,CAST(GETDATE() +1 AS DATE)))
	AND CalendarDate = EOMONTH(CalendarDate)
	--AND Division='FHI'

	)

SELECT 
A.Division,
A.CalendarDate,
M1.BTD_PCT,
M1.BTD_AMT_PCT,
M1.CANCEL_PCT,
M1.CANCELLED_AMT_PCT
INTO #T_BTD_CANCEL

FROM #T_BTD_CANCEL_3 A 
LEFT JOIN M1
ON EOMONTH(A.CalendarDate) = EOMONTH(M1.CalendarDate)
AND A.Division = M1.Division;




--**************************************************************************************
--######### LONG TERM CANCEL ADJUSTMENT TO BTD & CANCEL - ENDS HERE ##################
--**************************************************************************************




TRUNCATE TABLE [EDW_FCST].[FACT_BTD_CANCEL_NEW];



INSERT INTO [EDW_FCST].[FACT_BTD_CANCEL_NEW]

SELECT 
Division					,
'BY_DIVISION' AS Identifier	,
CalendarDate				,
CONCAT(DIVISION,'-')		AS BranchID		,
CONCAT(DIVISION,'-')		AS ProductID	,
BTD_PCT						,
BTD_AMT_PCT					,
CANCEL_PCT					,
CANCELLED_AMT_PCT			,
GETDATE() AS LastUpdatedTS
FROM #T_BTD_CANCEL;

--************************************************
-- BTD & CANCEL Calculation
--************************************************


SELECT 
A.CalendarDate,
B.Division,
B.BranchID,
B.ProductID
INTO #T_DIV_PROD_BRANCH
FROM
	(SELECT DISTINCT CalendarDate  FROM [EDW_FCST].[FACT_SALES_ACTUAL] ) A
	JOIN 
	(SELECT DISTINCT DIVISION,BranchID,CONCAT(DIVISION,'-') AS ProductID FROM [EDW_FCST].[FACT_SALES_ACTUAL] 
	WHERE BranchID IS NOT NULL) B
	ON 1=1;



--*********************
-- BTD Date Gen
--*********************


-- Generate Cal_Date_PRED for 28 Days Avg

SELECT A1.*,A2.Division,A2.BranchID,A2.ProductID 
INTO 
#T_CAL_BTD
FROM 
(
SELECT 
    C1.CalendarDate,
    C2.CalendarDate AS Cal_Date_PRED
FROM 
    EDW.DIM_CALENDAR C1
JOIN 
    EDW.DIM_CALENDAR C2 
    ON C2.CalendarDate BETWEEN DATEADD(DAY, -39, C1.CalendarDate) -- 27 + 13
                             AND DATEADD(DAY, -12, C1.CalendarDate)

	) A1

JOIN #T_DIV_PROD_BRANCH A2 
ON A1.CalendarDate = A2.CalendarDate

WHERE A1.CalendarDate>='2022-01-01' AND A1.CalendarDate<=  CAST(GETDATE()+100 AS DATE);


--*************************
-- Cancel Date Gen
--*************************

-- Generate Cal_Date_PRED for 56 Days Avg

SELECT A1.*,A2.Division,A2.BranchID,A2.ProductID  INTO 
#T_CAL_CANCEL
FROM 

(
SELECT 
    C1.CalendarDate,
    C2.CalendarDate AS Cal_Date_PRED
FROM 
    EDW.DIM_CALENDAR C1
JOIN 
    EDW.DIM_CALENDAR C2 
    ON C2.CalendarDate BETWEEN DATEADD(DAY, -111, C1.CalendarDate) -- ( 55 + 57 )
                             AND DATEADD(DAY, -56, C1.CalendarDate)

	) A1
	
JOIN #T_DIV_PROD_BRANCH A2 
ON A1.CalendarDate = A2.CalendarDate

WHERE A1.CalendarDate>='2022-01-01' AND A1.CalendarDate<=CAST(GETDATE()+100 AS DATE);




--**********************************************
--############## BTD Cal STARTS HERE ###########
--**********************************************

SELECT 
Division,
BranchID,
ProductID,
CalendarDate,
SUM(SOLD) 				AS SOLD			,
SUM(GROSS_SALES) 		AS GROSS_SALES	,
SUM(BTD_PCT_ROLLUP) 	AS BTD_PCT 		,
SUM(BTD_AMT_PCT_ROLLUP) AS BTD_AMT_PCT
INTO #T_BTD_1

FROM 
(
		SELECT 
		Division,
		BranchID,
		ProductID,
		CalendarDate,
		Cal_Date_PRED,
		BTD,
		CANCELLED,
		SOLD,
		SOLD_SUM_PRED,
		SOLD_SUM_PRED_PCT,
		BTD_WGTD_PCT,
		(SOLD_SUM_PRED_PCT * BTD_WGTD_PCT ) AS BTD_PCT_ROLLUP,
		GROSS_SALES,
		GROSS_SALES_SUM_PRED,
		GROSS_SALES_SUM_PRED_PCT,
		(GROSS_SALES_SUM_PRED_PCT * BTD_AMT_WGTD_PCT ) AS BTD_AMT_PCT_ROLLUP
		
		FROM
		(
		
				SELECT 
				Division,
				BranchID,
				ProductID,
				CalendarDate,
				Cal_Date_PRED,
				BTD,
				CANCELLED,
				SOLD,
				SOLD_SUM_PRED,
				CASE WHEN SOLD_SUM_PRED=0	THEN 0.000 ELSE	(SOLD * 1.000 / SOLD_SUM_PRED * 1.000) END AS SOLD_SUM_PRED_PCT,
				CASE WHEN SOLD=0			THEN 0.000 ELSE  (BTD * 1.000 / SOLD * 1.000) END AS BTD_WGTD_PCT,
				GROSS_SALES_SUM_PRED,
				GROSS_SALES,
				CASE WHEN GROSS_SALES_SUM_PRED=0	THEN 0.000 ELSE	(GROSS_SALES * 1.000 / GROSS_SALES_SUM_PRED * 1.000) END AS GROSS_SALES_SUM_PRED_PCT,
				CASE WHEN GROSS_SALES=0				THEN 0.000 ELSE  (BTD_AMT * 1.000 / GROSS_SALES * 1.000) END AS BTD_AMT_WGTD_PCT
				
				
				FROM 
				(
				
					SELECT 
					Division,
					BranchID,
					ProductID,
					CalendarDate,
					Cal_Date_PRED,
					BTD,
					CANCELLED,
					SOLD,
					SUM(SOLD) OVER (PARTITION BY Division,BranchID,ProductID,CalendarDate) AS SOLD_SUM_PRED,
					BTD_AMT,
					GROSS_SALES,
					SUM(GROSS_SALES) OVER (PARTITION BY Division,BranchID,ProductID,CalendarDate) AS GROSS_SALES_SUM_PRED
					
					FROM 
					(
						SELECT 
						A.Division		,
						A.BranchID		,
						A.ProductID		,
						A.CalendarDate	,
						A.Cal_Date_PRED	,
						SUM(COALESCE(B.BTD,0.00)) 			AS BTD			,
						SUM(COALESCE(B.CANCELLED,0.00)) 	AS CANCELLED	,
						SUM(COALESCE(B.SOLD,0.00)) 			AS SOLD			,
						SUM(COALESCE(B.BTD_AMT,0.00)) 		AS BTD_AMT		,
						SUM(COALESCE(B.GROSS_SALES,0.00)) 	AS GROSS_SALES
						
						FROM #T_CAL_BTD A 
						LEFT JOIN 
								(SELECT 
									CalendarDate										  ,
									BranchID											  ,
									CONCAT(DIVISION,'-') AS ProductID									  ,  
									SUM(COALESCE(BTD,0.00)) 			AS BTD			  ,
									SUM(COALESCE(CANCELLED,0.00)) 		AS CANCELLED	  ,
									SUM(COALESCE(SOLD,0.00)) 			AS SOLD			  ,
									SUM(COALESCE(BTD_AMT,0.00)) 		AS BTD_AMT		  ,
									SUM(COALESCE(GROSS_SALES,0.00)) 	AS GROSS_SALES
									FROM
									[EDW_FCST].[FACT_SALES_ACTUAL]
									GROUP BY									
									CalendarDate,
									BranchID,
									CONCAT(DIVISION,'-')
									) B
						ON A.Cal_Date_PRED 	= B.CalendarDate
						AND A.BranchID 		= B.BranchID 
						AND A.ProductID 	= B.ProductID
						GROUP BY 
						A.Division,
						A.CalendarDate,
						A.Cal_Date_PRED,
						A.BranchID,
						A.ProductID
						
						) M1
						
					) M2
		
				) M3
		
		) M4

GROUP BY Division,
CalendarDate,
BranchID,
ProductID;


--**********************************************
--############## BTD Cal ENDS HERE ###########
--**********************************************



--****************************************
-- ######## CANCEL CAL STARTS HERE  ######
--****************************************




SELECT 
Division,
BranchID,
ProductID,
CalendarDate,
SUM(SOLD) 				AS SOLD			,
SUM(GROSS_SALES) 		AS GROSS_SALES	,
SUM(CANCEL_PCT_ROLLUP) 		AS 	CANCEL_PCT ,
SUM(CANCELLED_AMT_ROLLUP) 	AS 	CANCELLED_AMT_PCT 
INTO #T_CANCEL_1

FROM 
(
		SELECT 
		Division,
		BranchID,
		ProductID,
		CalendarDate,
		Cal_Date_PRED,
		BTD,
		CANCELLED,
		SOLD,
		SOLD_SUM_PRED,
		GROSS_SALES,
		SOLD_SUM_PRED_PCT,
		CANCELLED_WGTD_PCT,
		(SOLD_SUM_PRED_PCT * CANCELLED_WGTD_PCT ) AS CANCEL_PCT_ROLLUP,
		GROSS_SALES_SUM_PRED_PCT,
		CANCELLED_AMT_WGTD_PCT,
		(GROSS_SALES_SUM_PRED_PCT * CANCELLED_AMT_WGTD_PCT ) AS CANCELLED_AMT_ROLLUP
		
		FROM
		(
		
				SELECT 
				Division,
				BranchID,
				ProductID,
				CalendarDate,
				Cal_Date_PRED,
				BTD,
				CANCELLED,
				SOLD,
				GROSS_SALES,
				SOLD_SUM_PRED,
				CASE WHEN SOLD_SUM_PRED=0	THEN 0.000 ELSE	(SOLD * 1.000 / SOLD_SUM_PRED * 1.000) END AS SOLD_SUM_PRED_PCT,
				CASE WHEN SOLD=0			THEN 0.000 ELSE  (CANCELLED * 1.000 / SOLD * 1.000) END AS CANCELLED_WGTD_PCT,
				
				CASE WHEN GROSS_SALES_SUM_PRED=0	THEN 0.000 ELSE	(GROSS_SALES * 1.000 / GROSS_SALES_SUM_PRED * 1.000) END AS GROSS_SALES_SUM_PRED_PCT,
				CASE WHEN GROSS_SALES=0			THEN 0.000 ELSE  (CANCELLED_AMT * 1.000 / GROSS_SALES * 1.000) END AS CANCELLED_AMT_WGTD_PCT
				
				FROM 
				(
				
					SELECT 
					Division,
					BranchID,
					ProductID,
					CalendarDate,
					Cal_Date_PRED,
					BTD,
					CANCELLED,
					SOLD,
					SUM(SOLD) OVER (PARTITION BY Division,BranchID,ProductID,CalendarDate) AS SOLD_SUM_PRED,
					GROSS_SALES,
					CANCELLED_AMT,
					SUM(GROSS_SALES) OVER (PARTITION BY Division,BranchID,ProductID,CalendarDate) AS GROSS_SALES_SUM_PRED
					
					FROM 
					(
						SELECT 
						A.Division,
						A.BranchID,
						A.ProductID,
						A.CalendarDate,
						A.Cal_Date_PRED,
						SUM(B.BTD) 			AS BTD,
						SUM(B.CANCELLED) 	AS CANCELLED,
						SUM(B.SOLD) 		AS SOLD,
						SUM(B.CANCELLED_AMT) 	AS CANCELLED_AMT,
						SUM(B.GROSS_SALES) 		AS GROSS_SALES
						
						FROM #T_CAL_CANCEL A 
						JOIN (SELECT 
									CalendarDate										  ,
									BranchID											  ,
									CONCAT(DIVISION,'-') AS ProductID									  ,  
									SUM(COALESCE(BTD,0.00)) 			AS BTD			  ,
									SUM(COALESCE(CANCELLED,0.00)) 		AS CANCELLED	  ,
									SUM(COALESCE(SOLD,0.00)) 			AS SOLD			  ,
									SUM(COALESCE(CANCELLED_AMT,0.00)) 	AS CANCELLED_AMT  ,
									SUM(COALESCE(GROSS_SALES,0.00)) 	AS GROSS_SALES
									FROM
									[EDW_FCST].[FACT_SALES_ACTUAL]
									GROUP BY									
									CalendarDate,
									BranchID,
									CONCAT(DIVISION,'-')
									) B 
						ON A.Cal_Date_PRED = B.CalendarDate
						AND A.BranchID 		= B.BranchID 
						AND A.ProductID 	= B.ProductID
						GROUP BY 
						A.Division,
						A.CalendarDate,
						A.Cal_Date_PRED,
						A.BranchID,
						A.ProductID
						) M1
						
					) M2
		
				) M3
		
		) M4

GROUP BY Division,
CalendarDate,
BranchID,
ProductID;

--****************************************
-- ######## CANCEL CAL ENDS HERE  ######
--****************************************


--*******************************************
--####### MTD ACTUALS STARTS HERE ##########
--*******************************************

SELECT 
Division,
CalendarDate,
BranchID,
ProductID,
CASE WHEN MTD_SOLD=0		THEN 0.000 ELSE (MTD_BTD * 1.000 / MTD_SOLD * 1.000)					END AS MTD_BTD_PCT_ACT,
CASE WHEN MTD_GROSS_SALES=0 THEN 0.000 ELSE (MTD_BTD_AMT * 1.000 / MTD_GROSS_SALES * 1.000) 		END AS MTD_BTD_AMT_PCT_ACT,

CASE WHEN MTD_SOLD=0 THEN 0.000			ELSE (MTD_CANCELLED * 1.000 / MTD_SOLD * 1.000)				END AS MTD_CANCEL_PCT_ACT,
CASE WHEN MTD_GROSS_SALES=0 THEN 0.000	ELSE (MTD_CANCELLED_AMT * 1.000 / MTD_GROSS_SALES * 1.000)	END AS MTD_CANCEL_AMT_PCT_ACT


INTO #T_MTD_BTD_CANCEL
FROM 
(

	SELECT 
	Division,
	EOMONTH(CalendarDate) AS CalendarDate,
	BranchID,
	CONCAT(DIVISION,'-') AS ProductID,
	SUM(BTD) 			AS MTD_BTD,
	SUM(BTD_AMT) 		AS MTD_BTD_AMT,
	SUM(SOLD) 			AS MTD_SOLD,
	SUM(CANCELLED) 		AS MTD_CANCELLED,
	SUM(CANCELLED_AMT) 	AS MTD_CANCELLED_AMT,
	SUM(GROSS_SALES) 	AS MTD_GROSS_SALES
	FROM 			
	[EDW_FCST].[FACT_SALES_ACTUAL] 
	GROUP BY 
	Division,
	EOMONTH(CalendarDate),
	BranchID
		
	) M1;

--####### MTD END HERE ##########
--*******************************************


--***********************************************************
--######### LONG TERM CANCEL - STARTS HERE ##################
--***********************************************************


SELECT 
A.CalendarDate,
A.ProductID,
A.BranchID,
A.Division,

COALESCE(B.LT_Cancel_8WK,0)  		AS Cancel_Count_8WK ,
COALESCE(B.LT_Cancel_16WK,0) 		AS Cancel_Count_16WK,
COALESCE(B.LT_Cancel_8WK_AMT,0)  	AS Cancel_Count_8WK_AMT ,
COALESCE(B.LT_Cancel_16WK_AMT,0)  	AS Cancel_Count_16WK_AMT ,
COALESCE(C.Sold,0) 			 		AS Sold_Count,
COALESCE(C.GrossSales,0)			AS GrossSales

INTO #T_CAN_1

FROM #T_DIV_PROD_BRANCH  A
LEFT JOIN	
	
(
	SELECT 
	Division,
	ContractDate,
	BranchID,
	ProductID,
	SUM(LT_Cancel_8Week)  AS LT_Cancel_8WK,
	SUM(LT_Cancel_16Week) AS LT_Cancel_16WK,
	SUM(LT_Cancel_8Week_AMT) 	AS LT_Cancel_8WK_AMT,
	SUM(LT_Cancel_16Week_AMT) 	AS LT_Cancel_16WK_AMT
	FROM 
	(
		
		SELECT 
		LeadID,
		JobID,
		BranchID,
		ProductID,
		Division,
		ContractDate,
		CancelDate,	
		CASE WHEN DAY_DIFF > 56  AND GrossSales > 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS LT_Cancel_8Week,
		CASE WHEN DAY_DIFF > 112 AND GrossSales > 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS LT_Cancel_16Week,
		CASE WHEN DAY_DIFF > 56  AND GrossSales > 0 THEN GrossSales ELSE 0 END AS LT_Cancel_8Week_AMT,
		CASE WHEN DAY_DIFF > 112 AND GrossSales > 0 THEN GrossSales ELSE 0 END AS LT_Cancel_16Week_AMT
		FROM 
		(	
			SELECT
				B.LeadID,
				B.Division,
				B.BranchID,
				CONCAT(B.DIVISION,'-') AS ProductID,
				a.JobID,
				CAST(A.ContractDate AS DATE) AS ContractDate,
				CAST(A.CancelDate AS DATE) AS CancelDate,
				DATEDIFF(DAY,A.ContractDate,A.CancelDate) AS DAY_DIFF,
				(
					CASE 
						WHEN A.Division IN ('MXH','CTA','SWR') THEN A.GrossAmount ELSE 
							(
								CASE WHEN A.JobNetAmt>0 THEN JobNetAmt ELSE A.GrossAmount END
								) END
						) AS GrossSales
			
				FROM EDW.FACT_LEAD B
				LEFT JOIN EDW.FACT_JOB  A
				ON A.LeadID = B.LeadID
				LEFT JOIN EDW.DIM_JOB_STATUS C
				ON A.JobStatusID = C.JobStatusID
				WHERE UPPER(C.UNI_JOBSTATUSCATEGORY)='CANCELLED' 			
				AND A.CancelDate IS NOT NULL
				AND CAST(A.ContractDate AS DATE) >='2019-01-01'
				

				) M1
			
			) M2
		
		GROUP BY 
		Division,
		ContractDate,
		BranchID,
		ProductID
		
	) B 

ON A.CalendarDate = B.ContractDate
AND A.Division = B.Division
AND A.ProductID = B.ProductID
AND A.BranchID = B.BranchID

LEFT JOIN 
	(
		SELECT 
			CalendarDate,
			Division,
			BranchID,
			CONCAT(DIVISION,'-') AS ProductID,
			SUM(Sold) 		AS Sold,
			SUM(Gross_Sales) AS GrossSales
			
			FROM [EDW_FCST].[FACT_SALES_ACTUAL] 
			GROUP BY 
			CalendarDate,
			Division,
			BranchID
			--ProductID
		
		) C

ON A.CalendarDate 	= C.CalendarDate
 AND A.Division 		= C.Division
 AND A.BranchID 	= C.BranchID
 AND A.ProductID 	= C.ProductID
 
WHERE A.CalendarDate <= GETDATE() + 6
AND A.CalendarDate >= '2019-01-01';




--***************





SELECT 
CalendarDate,
Division,
BranchID,
ProductID,
Cancel_Count_8WK_Last12to6Months,
Cancel_Count_16WK_Last12to6Months,
Sold_Count_Last12to6Months,
CASE WHEN Sold_Count_Last12to6Months=0 THEN 0 ELSE ( Cancel_Count_8WK_Last12to6Months  * 1.0 / Sold_Count_Last12to6Months * 1.0 ) END AS Cancel_Count_8WK_AVG,
CASE WHEN Sold_Count_Last12to6Months=0 THEN 0 ELSE ( Cancel_Count_16WK_Last12to6Months * 1.0 / Sold_Count_Last12to6Months * 1.0 ) END AS Cancel_Count_16WK_AVG,

CASE WHEN GrossSales_Last12to6Months=0 THEN 0 ELSE ( Cancel_Count_8WK_Last12to6Months_AMT  * 1.0 / GrossSales_Last12to6Months * 1.0 ) END AS Cancel_Count_8WK_AVG_AMT,
CASE WHEN GrossSales_Last12to6Months=0 THEN 0 ELSE ( Cancel_Count_16WK_Last12to6Months_AMT  * 1.0 / GrossSales_Last12to6Months * 1.0 ) END AS Cancel_Count_16WK_AVG_AMT

INTO #T_LT_CANCEL

FROM 
(
	SELECT 
		A.CalendarDate,
		A.Division,
		A.BranchID,
		A.ProductID,
		SUM(B.Cancel_Count_8WK) 		AS Cancel_Count_8WK_Last12to6Months,
		SUM(B.Cancel_Count_16WK) 		AS Cancel_Count_16WK_Last12to6Months,
		
		SUM(B.Cancel_Count_8WK_AMT) 	AS Cancel_Count_8WK_Last12to6Months_AMT,
		SUM(B.Cancel_Count_16WK_AMT) 	AS Cancel_Count_16WK_Last12to6Months_AMT,
		
		SUM(B.Sold_Count) 				AS Sold_Count_Last12to6Months,
		SUM(B.GrossSales) 				AS GrossSales_Last12to6Months
		
	FROM #T_CAN_1 A
	LEFT JOIN #T_CAN_1 B
		ON B.Division = A.Division
		AND B.BranchID = A.BranchID 
		AND B.ProductID = A.ProductID
		
	AND B.CalendarDate BETWEEN DATEFROMPARTS(YEAR(DATEADD(MONTH, -12, A.CalendarDate)), MONTH(DATEADD(MONTH, -12, A.CalendarDate)), 1) -- First Day of Month
							AND EOMONTH(DATEADD(MONTH, -6, A.CalendarDate))  -- Last Day of Month
	GROUP BY A.CalendarDate, A.Division, A.BranchID, A.ProductID
	
	) M1 

WHERE CalendarDate >= '2022-01-01'
AND CalendarDate <= GETDATE() + 6
AND CalendarDate <= EOMONTH(GETDATE());

--######### LONG TERM CANCEL ADJUSTMENT TO BTD & CANCEL - STARTS HERE ##################
--**************************************************************************************



-- LT Adjustment to Cancel

SELECT 
A.Division,
A.BranchID,
A.ProductID,
A.CalendarDate,
CASE WHEN A.Division ='RTW' THEN A.CANCEL_PCT ELSE (A.CANCEL_PCT + COALESCE(B.Cancel_Count_8Wk_AVG,0) ) END AS CANCEL_PCT,
CASE WHEN A.Division ='RTW' THEN A.CANCELLED_AMT_PCT ELSE (A.CANCELLED_AMT_PCT  + COALESCE(B.Cancel_Count_16Wk_AVG_AMT,0)) END AS CANCELLED_AMT_PCT

--(A.CANCEL_PCT + COALESCE(B.Cancel_Count_8Wk_AVG,0) ) AS CANCEL_PCT ,
--(A.CANCELLED_AMT_PCT  + COALESCE(B.Cancel_Count_16Wk_AVG_AMT,0)) AS CANCELLED_AMT_PCT
INTO #T_CANCEL_2
FROM #T_CANCEL_1 A 
LEFT JOIN #T_LT_CANCEL B 
ON A.CalendarDate 	= B.CalendarDate
AND A.Division 		= B.Division
AND A.BranchID 		= B.BranchID
AND A.ProductID 	= B.ProductID



-- BTD and Cancel Combined 

SELECT 
A.Division,
A.CalendarDate,
A.BranchID,
A.ProductID,

A.BTD_PCT ,
A.BTD_AMT_PCT,
COALESCE(B.CANCEL_PCT,0.0000) AS CANCEL_PCT,
COALESCE(B.CANCELLED_AMT_PCT,0.0000) AS CANCELLED_AMT_PCT,

C.MTD_BTD_PCT_ACT,
C.MTD_BTD_AMT_PCT_ACT,
C.MTD_CANCEL_PCT_ACT,
C.MTD_CANCEL_AMT_PCT_ACT

INTO #T_BTD_CANCEL_COMBINED_LT_ADJUSTED

FROM #T_BTD_1 A 
LEFT JOIN #T_CANCEL_2 B 
ON A.CalendarDate = B.CalendarDate
AND A.Division = B.Division
AND A.BranchID 		= B.BranchID
AND A.ProductID 	= B.ProductID

LEFT JOIN #T_MTD_BTD_CANCEL C 
ON  EOMONTH(A.CalendarDate) 	= EOMONTH(C.CalendarDate)
AND A.Division 					= C.Division
AND A.BranchID 					= C.BranchID
AND A.ProductID 				= C.ProductID

WHERE A.CalendarDate <= GETDATE()+6
AND A.CalendarDate <= EOMONTH(GETDATE());





--*******************************



SELECT 
Division		,
CalendarDate	,
BranchID		,
ProductID		,

CASE WHEN BTD_IND=1 THEN MTD_BTD_PCT_ACT		ELSE BTD_PCT		END AS BTD_PCT, 
CASE WHEN BTD_IND=1 THEN MTD_BTD_AMT_PCT_ACT	ELSE BTD_AMT_PCT	END AS BTD_AMT_PCT, 

CASE WHEN CANCEL_IND=1 THEN MTD_CANCEL_PCT_ACT		ELSE CANCEL_PCT		END AS CANCEL_PCT, 
CASE WHEN CANCEL_IND=1 THEN MTD_CANCEL_AMT_PCT_ACT	ELSE CANCELLED_AMT_PCT	END AS CANCELLED_AMT_PCT

INTO #T_BTD_CANCEL_3

FROM
(
	
				SELECT 
				Division,
				BranchID,
				ProductID,
				CalendarDate,
				MTD_BTD_PCT_ACT,
				MTD_BTD_AMT_PCT_ACT,
				MTD_CANCEL_PCT_ACT,
				MTD_CANCEL_AMT_PCT_ACT,
				BTD_PCT,
				BTD_AMT_PCT,
				CANCEL_PCT,
				CANCELLED_AMT_PCT,
				CASE WHEN BTD_PCT < MTD_BTD_PCT_ACT AND DAY(CalendarDate) > 12 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS BTD_Ind,
				CASE WHEN CANCEL_PCT < MTD_CANCEL_PCT_ACT AND DAY(CalendarDate) > 12 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS Cancel_Ind
				FROM  #T_BTD_CANCEL_COMBINED_LT_ADJUSTED
			

		) M2;







--******************************



WITH M1 AS
(
	SELECT  
	Division,
	CalendarDate,
	BranchID,
	ProductID,
	COALESCE(BTD_PCT,0.00) 				AS BTD_PCT,
	COALESCE(BTD_AMT_PCT,0.00) 			AS BTD_AMT_PCT,
	COALESCE(CANCEL_PCT,0.00) 			AS CANCEL_PCT,
	COALESCE(CANCELLED_AMT_PCT,0.00) 	AS CANCELLED_AMT_PCT
	FROM #T_BTD_CANCEL_3 
	WHERE CalendarDate=CAST(GETDATE() +1 AS DATE)

	UNION ALL

	SELECT  
	Division,
	CalendarDate,
	BranchID,
	ProductID,
	COALESCE(BTD_PCT,0.00) 				AS BTD_PCT,
	COALESCE(BTD_AMT_PCT,0.00) 			AS BTD_AMT_PCT,
	COALESCE(CANCEL_PCT,0.00) 			AS CANCEL_PCT,
	COALESCE(CANCELLED_AMT_PCT,0.00) 	AS CANCELLED_AMT_PCT
	FROM #T_BTD_CANCEL_3 
	WHERE CalendarDate<=EOMONTH(DATEADD(MONTH,-1,CAST(GETDATE() +1 AS DATE)))
	AND CalendarDate = EOMONTH(CalendarDate)
	--AND Division='FHI'

	)

SELECT 
A.Division,
A.CalendarDate,
A.BranchID,
A.ProductID,
M1.BTD_PCT,
M1.BTD_AMT_PCT,
M1.CANCEL_PCT,
M1.CANCELLED_AMT_PCT
INTO #T_BTD_CANCEL

FROM #T_BTD_CANCEL_3 A 
LEFT JOIN M1
ON EOMONTH(A.CalendarDate) = EOMONTH(M1.CalendarDate)
AND A.Division  = M1.Division
AND A.BranchID  = M1.BranchID
AND	A.ProductID = M1.ProductID

--************************************************
-- BTD & CANCEL Calculation
--************************************************


SELECT 
A.CalendarDate,
B.Division,
B.BranchID,
B.ProductID
INTO #T_DIV_PROD_BRANCH
FROM
	(SELECT DISTINCT CalendarDate  FROM [EDW_FCST].[FACT_SALES_ACTUAL] ) A
	JOIN 
	(SELECT DISTINCT DIVISION,CONCAT(DIVISION,'-') AS BranchID,ProductID FROM [EDW_FCST].[FACT_SALES_ACTUAL] 
	WHERE BranchID IS NOT NULL) B
	ON 1=1;



--*********************
-- BTD Date Gen
--*********************


-- Generate Cal_Date_PRED for 28 Days Avg

SELECT A1.*,A2.Division,A2.BranchID,A2.ProductID 
INTO 
#T_CAL_BTD
FROM 
(
SELECT 
    C1.CalendarDate,
    C2.CalendarDate AS Cal_Date_PRED
FROM 
    EDW.DIM_CALENDAR C1
JOIN 
    EDW.DIM_CALENDAR C2 
    ON C2.CalendarDate BETWEEN DATEADD(DAY, -39, C1.CalendarDate) -- 27 + 13
                             AND DATEADD(DAY, -12, C1.CalendarDate)

	) A1

JOIN #T_DIV_PROD_BRANCH A2 
ON A1.CalendarDate = A2.CalendarDate

WHERE A1.CalendarDate>='2022-01-01' AND A1.CalendarDate<=  CAST(GETDATE()+100 AS DATE);


--*************************
-- Cancel Date Gen
--*************************

-- Generate Cal_Date_PRED for 56 Days Avg

SELECT A1.*,A2.Division,A2.BranchID,A2.ProductID  INTO 
#T_CAL_CANCEL
FROM 

(
SELECT 
    C1.CalendarDate,
    C2.CalendarDate AS Cal_Date_PRED
FROM 
    EDW.DIM_CALENDAR C1
JOIN 
    EDW.DIM_CALENDAR C2 
    ON C2.CalendarDate BETWEEN DATEADD(DAY, -111, C1.CalendarDate) -- ( 55 + 57 )
                             AND DATEADD(DAY, -56, C1.CalendarDate)

	) A1
	
JOIN #T_DIV_PROD_BRANCH A2 
ON A1.CalendarDate = A2.CalendarDate

WHERE A1.CalendarDate>='2022-01-01' AND A1.CalendarDate<=CAST(GETDATE()+100 AS DATE);

SELECT 
Division,
BranchID,
ProductID,
CalendarDate,
SUM(SOLD) 				AS SOLD			,
SUM(GROSS_SALES) 		AS GROSS_SALES	,
SUM(BTD_PCT_ROLLUP) 	AS BTD_PCT 		,
SUM(BTD_AMT_PCT_ROLLUP) AS BTD_AMT_PCT
INTO #T_BTD_1

FROM 
(
		SELECT 
		Division,
		BranchID,
		ProductID,
		CalendarDate,
		Cal_Date_PRED,
		BTD,
		CANCELLED,
		SOLD,
		SOLD_SUM_PRED,
		SOLD_SUM_PRED_PCT,
		BTD_WGTD_PCT,
		(SOLD_SUM_PRED_PCT * BTD_WGTD_PCT ) AS BTD_PCT_ROLLUP,
		GROSS_SALES,
		GROSS_SALES_SUM_PRED,
		GROSS_SALES_SUM_PRED_PCT,
		(GROSS_SALES_SUM_PRED_PCT * BTD_AMT_WGTD_PCT ) AS BTD_AMT_PCT_ROLLUP
		
		FROM
		(
		
				SELECT 
				Division,
				BranchID,
				ProductID,
				CalendarDate,
				Cal_Date_PRED,
				BTD,
				CANCELLED,
				SOLD,
				SOLD_SUM_PRED,
				CASE WHEN SOLD_SUM_PRED=0	THEN 0.000 ELSE	(SOLD * 1.000 / SOLD_SUM_PRED * 1.000) END AS SOLD_SUM_PRED_PCT,
				CASE WHEN SOLD=0			THEN 0.000 ELSE  (BTD * 1.000 / SOLD * 1.000) END AS BTD_WGTD_PCT,
				GROSS_SALES_SUM_PRED,
				GROSS_SALES,
				CASE WHEN GROSS_SALES_SUM_PRED=0	THEN 0.000 ELSE	(GROSS_SALES * 1.000 / GROSS_SALES_SUM_PRED * 1.000) END AS GROSS_SALES_SUM_PRED_PCT,
				CASE WHEN GROSS_SALES=0				THEN 0.000 ELSE  (BTD_AMT * 1.000 / GROSS_SALES * 1.000) END AS BTD_AMT_WGTD_PCT
				
				
				FROM 
				(
				
					SELECT 
					Division,
					BranchID,
					ProductID,
					CalendarDate,
					Cal_Date_PRED,
					BTD,
					CANCELLED,
					SOLD,
					SUM(SOLD) OVER (PARTITION BY Division,BranchID,ProductID,CalendarDate) AS SOLD_SUM_PRED,
					BTD_AMT,
					GROSS_SALES,
					SUM(GROSS_SALES) OVER (PARTITION BY Division,BranchID,ProductID,CalendarDate) AS GROSS_SALES_SUM_PRED
					
					FROM 
					(
						SELECT 
						A.Division		,
						A.BranchID		,
						A.ProductID		,
						A.CalendarDate	,
						A.Cal_Date_PRED	,
						SUM(COALESCE(B.BTD,0.00)) 			AS BTD			,
						SUM(COALESCE(B.CANCELLED,0.00)) 	AS CANCELLED	,
						SUM(COALESCE(B.SOLD,0.00)) 			AS SOLD			,
						SUM(COALESCE(B.BTD_AMT,0.00)) 		AS BTD_AMT		,
						SUM(COALESCE(B.GROSS_SALES,0.00)) 	AS GROSS_SALES
						
						FROM #T_CAL_BTD A 
						LEFT JOIN 
								(SELECT 
									CalendarDate										  ,
									CONCAT(DIVISION,'-') AS BranchID											  ,
									ProductID									  ,  
									SUM(COALESCE(BTD,0.00)) 			AS BTD			  ,
									SUM(COALESCE(CANCELLED,0.00)) 		AS CANCELLED	  ,
									SUM(COALESCE(SOLD,0.00)) 			AS SOLD			  ,
									SUM(COALESCE(BTD_AMT,0.00)) 		AS BTD_AMT		  ,
									SUM(COALESCE(GROSS_SALES,0.00)) 	AS GROSS_SALES
									FROM
									[EDW_FCST].[FACT_SALES_ACTUAL]
									GROUP BY									
									CalendarDate,
									ProductID,
									CONCAT(DIVISION,'-')
									) B
						ON A.Cal_Date_PRED 	= B.CalendarDate
						AND A.BranchID 		= B.BranchID 
						AND A.ProductID 	= B.ProductID
						GROUP BY 
						A.Division,
						A.CalendarDate,
						A.Cal_Date_PRED,
						A.BranchID,
						A.ProductID
						
						) M1
						
					) M2
		
				) M3
		
		) M4

GROUP BY Division,
CalendarDate,
BranchID,
ProductID;

--############## BTD Cal ENDS HERE ###########

--****************************************
-- ######## CANCEL CAL STARTS HERE  ######
--****************************************




SELECT 
Division,
BranchID,
ProductID,
CalendarDate,
SUM(SOLD) 				AS SOLD			,
SUM(GROSS_SALES) 		AS GROSS_SALES	,
SUM(CANCEL_PCT_ROLLUP) 		AS 	CANCEL_PCT ,
SUM(CANCELLED_AMT_ROLLUP) 	AS 	CANCELLED_AMT_PCT 
INTO #T_CANCEL_1

FROM 
(
		SELECT 
		Division,
		BranchID,
		ProductID,
		CalendarDate,
		Cal_Date_PRED,
		BTD,
		CANCELLED,
		SOLD,
		SOLD_SUM_PRED,
		GROSS_SALES,
		SOLD_SUM_PRED_PCT,
		CANCELLED_WGTD_PCT,
		(SOLD_SUM_PRED_PCT * CANCELLED_WGTD_PCT ) AS CANCEL_PCT_ROLLUP,
		GROSS_SALES_SUM_PRED_PCT,
		CANCELLED_AMT_WGTD_PCT,
		(GROSS_SALES_SUM_PRED_PCT * CANCELLED_AMT_WGTD_PCT ) AS CANCELLED_AMT_ROLLUP
		
		FROM
		(
		
				SELECT 
				Division,
				BranchID,
				ProductID,
				CalendarDate,
				Cal_Date_PRED,
				BTD,
				CANCELLED,
				SOLD,
				GROSS_SALES,
				SOLD_SUM_PRED,
				CASE WHEN SOLD_SUM_PRED=0	THEN 0.000 ELSE	(SOLD * 1.000 / SOLD_SUM_PRED * 1.000) END AS SOLD_SUM_PRED_PCT,
				CASE WHEN SOLD=0			THEN 0.000 ELSE  (CANCELLED * 1.000 / SOLD * 1.000) END AS CANCELLED_WGTD_PCT,
				
				CASE WHEN GROSS_SALES_SUM_PRED=0	THEN 0.000 ELSE	(GROSS_SALES * 1.000 / GROSS_SALES_SUM_PRED * 1.000) END AS GROSS_SALES_SUM_PRED_PCT,
				CASE WHEN GROSS_SALES=0			THEN 0.000 ELSE  (CANCELLED_AMT * 1.000 / GROSS_SALES * 1.000) END AS CANCELLED_AMT_WGTD_PCT
				
				FROM 
				(
				
					SELECT 
					Division,
					BranchID,
					ProductID,
					CalendarDate,
					Cal_Date_PRED,
					BTD,
					CANCELLED,
					SOLD,
					SUM(SOLD) OVER (PARTITION BY Division,BranchID,ProductID,CalendarDate) AS SOLD_SUM_PRED,
					GROSS_SALES,
					CANCELLED_AMT,
					SUM(GROSS_SALES) OVER (PARTITION BY Division,BranchID,ProductID,CalendarDate) AS GROSS_SALES_SUM_PRED
					
					FROM 
					(
						SELECT 
						A.Division,
						A.BranchID,
						A.ProductID,
						A.CalendarDate,
						A.Cal_Date_PRED,
						SUM(B.BTD) 			AS BTD,
						SUM(B.CANCELLED) 	AS CANCELLED,
						SUM(B.SOLD) 		AS SOLD,
						SUM(B.CANCELLED_AMT) 	AS CANCELLED_AMT,
						SUM(B.GROSS_SALES) 		AS GROSS_SALES
						
						FROM #T_CAL_CANCEL A 
						JOIN (SELECT 
									CalendarDate										  ,
									CONCAT(DIVISION,'-') AS BranchID					  ,
									ProductID									  		  ,  
									SUM(COALESCE(BTD,0.00)) 			AS BTD			  ,
									SUM(COALESCE(CANCELLED,0.00)) 		AS CANCELLED	  ,
									SUM(COALESCE(SOLD,0.00)) 			AS SOLD			  ,
									SUM(COALESCE(CANCELLED_AMT,0.00)) 	AS CANCELLED_AMT  ,
									SUM(COALESCE(GROSS_SALES,0.00)) 	AS GROSS_SALES
									FROM
									[EDW_FCST].[FACT_SALES_ACTUAL]
									GROUP BY									
									CalendarDate,
									ProductID,
									CONCAT(DIVISION,'-')
									) B 
						ON A.Cal_Date_PRED = B.CalendarDate
						AND A.BranchID 		= B.BranchID 
						AND A.ProductID 	= B.ProductID
						GROUP BY 
						A.Division,
						A.CalendarDate,
						A.Cal_Date_PRED,
						A.BranchID,
						A.ProductID
						) M1
						
					) M2
		
				) M3
		
		) M4

GROUP BY Division,
CalendarDate,
BranchID,
ProductID;

--####### MTD ACTUALS STARTS HERE ##########
--*******************************************

SELECT 
Division,
CalendarDate,
BranchID,
ProductID,
CASE WHEN MTD_SOLD=0		THEN 0.000 ELSE (MTD_BTD * 1.000 / MTD_SOLD * 1.000)					END AS MTD_BTD_PCT_ACT,
CASE WHEN MTD_GROSS_SALES=0 THEN 0.000 ELSE (MTD_BTD_AMT * 1.000 / MTD_GROSS_SALES * 1.000) 		END AS MTD_BTD_AMT_PCT_ACT,

CASE WHEN MTD_SOLD=0 THEN 0.000			ELSE (MTD_CANCELLED * 1.000 / MTD_SOLD * 1.000)				END AS MTD_CANCEL_PCT_ACT,
CASE WHEN MTD_GROSS_SALES=0 THEN 0.000	ELSE (MTD_CANCELLED_AMT * 1.000 / MTD_GROSS_SALES * 1.000)	END AS MTD_CANCEL_AMT_PCT_ACT


INTO #T_MTD_BTD_CANCEL
FROM 
(

	SELECT 
	Division,
	EOMONTH(CalendarDate) AS CalendarDate,
	CONCAT(DIVISION,'-') AS BranchID,
	ProductID,
	SUM(BTD) 			AS MTD_BTD,
	SUM(BTD_AMT) 		AS MTD_BTD_AMT,
	SUM(SOLD) 			AS MTD_SOLD,
	SUM(CANCELLED) 		AS MTD_CANCELLED,
	SUM(CANCELLED_AMT) 	AS MTD_CANCELLED_AMT,
	SUM(GROSS_SALES) 	AS MTD_GROSS_SALES
	FROM 			
	[EDW_FCST].[FACT_SALES_ACTUAL] 
	GROUP BY 
	Division,
	EOMONTH(CalendarDate),
	ProductID
		
	) M1;

--######### LONG TERM CANCEL - STARTS HERE ##################
--***********************************************************


SELECT 
A.CalendarDate,
A.ProductID,
A.BranchID,
A.Division,

COALESCE(B.LT_Cancel_8WK,0)  		AS Cancel_Count_8WK ,
COALESCE(B.LT_Cancel_16WK,0) 		AS Cancel_Count_16WK,
COALESCE(B.LT_Cancel_8WK_AMT,0)  	AS Cancel_Count_8WK_AMT ,
COALESCE(B.LT_Cancel_16WK_AMT,0)  	AS Cancel_Count_16WK_AMT ,
COALESCE(C.Sold,0) 			 		AS Sold_Count,
COALESCE(C.GrossSales,0)			AS GrossSales

INTO #T_CAN_1

FROM #T_DIV_PROD_BRANCH  A
LEFT JOIN	
	
(
	SELECT 
	Division,
	ContractDate,
	BranchID,
	ProductID,
	SUM(LT_Cancel_8Week)  AS LT_Cancel_8WK,
	SUM(LT_Cancel_16Week) AS LT_Cancel_16WK,
	SUM(LT_Cancel_8Week_AMT) 	AS LT_Cancel_8WK_AMT,
	SUM(LT_Cancel_16Week_AMT) 	AS LT_Cancel_16WK_AMT
	FROM 
	(
		
		SELECT 
		LeadID,
		JobID,
		BranchID,
		ProductID,
		Division,
		ContractDate,
		CancelDate,	
		CASE WHEN DAY_DIFF > 56  AND GrossSales > 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS LT_Cancel_8Week,
		CASE WHEN DAY_DIFF > 112 AND GrossSales > 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS LT_Cancel_16Week,
		CASE WHEN DAY_DIFF > 56  AND GrossSales > 0 THEN GrossSales ELSE 0 END AS LT_Cancel_8Week_AMT,
		CASE WHEN DAY_DIFF > 112 AND GrossSales > 0 THEN GrossSales ELSE 0 END AS LT_Cancel_16Week_AMT
		FROM 
		(	
			SELECT
				B.LeadID,
				B.Division,
				CONCAT(B.DIVISION,'-') AS BranchID,
				B.ProductID,
				a.JobID,
				CAST(A.ContractDate AS DATE) AS ContractDate,
				CAST(A.CancelDate AS DATE) AS CancelDate,
				DATEDIFF(DAY,A.ContractDate,A.CancelDate) AS DAY_DIFF,
				(
					CASE 
						WHEN A.Division IN ('MXH','CTA','SWR') THEN A.GrossAmount ELSE 
							(
								CASE WHEN A.JobNetAmt>0 THEN JobNetAmt ELSE A.GrossAmount END
								) END
						) AS GrossSales
			
				FROM EDW.FACT_LEAD B
				LEFT JOIN EDW.FACT_JOB  A
				ON A.LeadID = B.LeadID
				LEFT JOIN EDW.DIM_JOB_STATUS C
				ON A.JobStatusID = C.JobStatusID
				WHERE UPPER(C.UNI_JOBSTATUSCATEGORY)='CANCELLED' 			
				AND A.CancelDate IS NOT NULL
				AND CAST(A.ContractDate AS DATE) >='2019-01-01'
				

				) M1
			
			) M2
		
		GROUP BY 
		Division,
		ContractDate,
		BranchID,
		ProductID
		
	) B 

ON A.CalendarDate = B.ContractDate
AND A.Division = B.Division
AND A.ProductID = B.ProductID
AND A.BranchID = B.BranchID

LEFT JOIN 
	(
		SELECT 
			CalendarDate,
			Division,
			CONCAT(DIVISION,'-') AS BranchID,
			ProductID,
			SUM(Sold) 		AS Sold,
			SUM(Gross_Sales) AS GrossSales
			
			FROM [EDW_FCST].[FACT_SALES_ACTUAL] 
			GROUP BY 
			CalendarDate,
			Division,
			ProductID
		
		) C

ON A.CalendarDate 	= C.CalendarDate
 AND A.Division 		= C.Division
 AND A.BranchID 	= C.BranchID
 AND A.ProductID 	= C.ProductID
 
WHERE A.CalendarDate <= GETDATE() + 6
AND A.CalendarDate >= '2019-01-01';




--***************





SELECT 
CalendarDate,
Division,
BranchID,
ProductID,
Cancel_Count_8WK_Last12to6Months,
Cancel_Count_16WK_Last12to6Months,
Sold_Count_Last12to6Months,
CASE WHEN Sold_Count_Last12to6Months=0 THEN 0 ELSE ( Cancel_Count_8WK_Last12to6Months  * 1.0 / Sold_Count_Last12to6Months * 1.0 ) END AS Cancel_Count_8WK_AVG,
CASE WHEN Sold_Count_Last12to6Months=0 THEN 0 ELSE ( Cancel_Count_16WK_Last12to6Months * 1.0 / Sold_Count_Last12to6Months * 1.0 ) END AS Cancel_Count_16WK_AVG,

CASE WHEN GrossSales_Last12to6Months=0 THEN 0 ELSE ( Cancel_Count_8WK_Last12to6Months_AMT  * 1.0 / GrossSales_Last12to6Months * 1.0 ) END AS Cancel_Count_8WK_AVG_AMT,
CASE WHEN GrossSales_Last12to6Months=0 THEN 0 ELSE ( Cancel_Count_16WK_Last12to6Months_AMT  * 1.0 / GrossSales_Last12to6Months * 1.0 ) END AS Cancel_Count_16WK_AVG_AMT

INTO #T_LT_CANCEL

FROM 
(
	SELECT 
		A.CalendarDate,
		A.Division,
		A.BranchID,
		A.ProductID,
		SUM(B.Cancel_Count_8WK) 		AS Cancel_Count_8WK_Last12to6Months,
		SUM(B.Cancel_Count_16WK) 		AS Cancel_Count_16WK_Last12to6Months,
		
		SUM(B.Cancel_Count_8WK_AMT) 	AS Cancel_Count_8WK_Last12to6Months_AMT,
		SUM(B.Cancel_Count_16WK_AMT) 	AS Cancel_Count_16WK_Last12to6Months_AMT,
		
		SUM(B.Sold_Count) 				AS Sold_Count_Last12to6Months,
		SUM(B.GrossSales) 				AS GrossSales_Last12to6Months
		
	FROM #T_CAN_1 A
	LEFT JOIN #T_CAN_1 B
		ON B.Division = A.Division
		AND B.BranchID = A.BranchID 
		AND B.ProductID = A.ProductID
		
	AND B.CalendarDate BETWEEN DATEFROMPARTS(YEAR(DATEADD(MONTH, -12, A.CalendarDate)), MONTH(DATEADD(MONTH, -12, A.CalendarDate)), 1) -- First Day of Month
							AND EOMONTH(DATEADD(MONTH, -6, A.CalendarDate))  -- Last Day of Month
	GROUP BY A.CalendarDate, A.Division, A.BranchID, A.ProductID
	
	) M1 

WHERE CalendarDate >= '2022-01-01'
AND CalendarDate <= GETDATE() + 6
AND CalendarDate <= EOMONTH(GETDATE());

-- LT Adjustment to Cancel

SELECT 
A.Division,
A.BranchID,
A.ProductID,
A.CalendarDate,
CASE WHEN A.Division ='RTW' THEN A.CANCEL_PCT ELSE (A.CANCEL_PCT + COALESCE(B.Cancel_Count_8Wk_AVG,0) ) END AS CANCEL_PCT,
CASE WHEN A.Division ='RTW' THEN A.CANCELLED_AMT_PCT ELSE (A.CANCELLED_AMT_PCT  + COALESCE(B.Cancel_Count_16Wk_AVG_AMT,0)) END AS CANCELLED_AMT_PCT

--(A.CANCEL_PCT + COALESCE(B.Cancel_Count_8Wk_AVG,0) ) AS CANCEL_PCT ,
--(A.CANCELLED_AMT_PCT  + COALESCE(B.Cancel_Count_16Wk_AVG_AMT,0)) AS CANCELLED_AMT_PCT
INTO #T_CANCEL_2
FROM #T_CANCEL_1 A 
LEFT JOIN #T_LT_CANCEL B 
ON A.CalendarDate 	= B.CalendarDate
AND A.Division 		= B.Division
AND A.BranchID 		= B.BranchID
AND A.ProductID 	= B.ProductID



-- BTD and Cancel Combined 

SELECT 
A.Division,
A.CalendarDate,
A.BranchID,
A.ProductID,

A.BTD_PCT ,
A.BTD_AMT_PCT,
COALESCE(B.CANCEL_PCT,0.0000) AS CANCEL_PCT,
COALESCE(B.CANCELLED_AMT_PCT,0.0000) AS CANCELLED_AMT_PCT,

C.MTD_BTD_PCT_ACT,
C.MTD_BTD_AMT_PCT_ACT,
C.MTD_CANCEL_PCT_ACT,
C.MTD_CANCEL_AMT_PCT_ACT

INTO #T_BTD_CANCEL_COMBINED_LT_ADJUSTED

FROM #T_BTD_1 A 
LEFT JOIN #T_CANCEL_2 B 
ON A.CalendarDate = B.CalendarDate
AND A.Division = B.Division
AND A.BranchID 		= B.BranchID
AND A.ProductID 	= B.ProductID

LEFT JOIN #T_MTD_BTD_CANCEL C 
ON  EOMONTH(A.CalendarDate) 	= EOMONTH(C.CalendarDate)
AND A.Division 					= C.Division
AND A.BranchID 					= C.BranchID
AND A.ProductID 				= C.ProductID

WHERE A.CalendarDate <= GETDATE()+6
AND A.CalendarDate <= EOMONTH(GETDATE());





--*******************************



SELECT 
Division		,
CalendarDate	,
BranchID		,
ProductID		,

CASE WHEN BTD_IND=1 THEN MTD_BTD_PCT_ACT		ELSE BTD_PCT		END AS BTD_PCT, 
CASE WHEN BTD_IND=1 THEN MTD_BTD_AMT_PCT_ACT	ELSE BTD_AMT_PCT	END AS BTD_AMT_PCT, 

CASE WHEN CANCEL_IND=1 THEN MTD_CANCEL_PCT_ACT		ELSE CANCEL_PCT		END AS CANCEL_PCT, 
CASE WHEN CANCEL_IND=1 THEN MTD_CANCEL_AMT_PCT_ACT	ELSE CANCELLED_AMT_PCT	END AS CANCELLED_AMT_PCT

INTO #T_BTD_CANCEL_3

FROM
(
	
				SELECT 
				Division,
				BranchID,
				ProductID,
				CalendarDate,
				MTD_BTD_PCT_ACT,
				MTD_BTD_AMT_PCT_ACT,
				MTD_CANCEL_PCT_ACT,
				MTD_CANCEL_AMT_PCT_ACT,
				BTD_PCT,
				BTD_AMT_PCT,
				CANCEL_PCT,
				CANCELLED_AMT_PCT,
				CASE WHEN BTD_PCT < MTD_BTD_PCT_ACT AND DAY(CalendarDate) > 12 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS BTD_Ind,
				CASE WHEN CANCEL_PCT < MTD_CANCEL_PCT_ACT AND DAY(CalendarDate) > 12 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS Cancel_Ind
				FROM  #T_BTD_CANCEL_COMBINED_LT_ADJUSTED
			

		) M2;







--******************************



WITH M1 AS
(
	SELECT  
	Division,
	CalendarDate,
	BranchID,
	ProductID,
	COALESCE(BTD_PCT,0.00) 				AS BTD_PCT,
	COALESCE(BTD_AMT_PCT,0.00) 			AS BTD_AMT_PCT,
	COALESCE(CANCEL_PCT,0.00) 			AS CANCEL_PCT,
	COALESCE(CANCELLED_AMT_PCT,0.00) 	AS CANCELLED_AMT_PCT
	FROM #T_BTD_CANCEL_3 
	WHERE CalendarDate=CAST(GETDATE() +1 AS DATE)

	UNION ALL

	SELECT  
	Division,
	CalendarDate,
	BranchID,
	ProductID,
	COALESCE(BTD_PCT,0.00) 				AS BTD_PCT,
	COALESCE(BTD_AMT_PCT,0.00) 			AS BTD_AMT_PCT,
	COALESCE(CANCEL_PCT,0.00) 			AS CANCEL_PCT,
	COALESCE(CANCELLED_AMT_PCT,0.00) 	AS CANCELLED_AMT_PCT
	FROM #T_BTD_CANCEL_3 
	WHERE CalendarDate<=EOMONTH(DATEADD(MONTH,-1,CAST(GETDATE() +1 AS DATE)))
	AND CalendarDate = EOMONTH(CalendarDate)
	--AND Division='FHI'

	)

SELECT 
A.Division,
A.CalendarDate,
A.BranchID,
A.ProductID,
M1.BTD_PCT,
M1.BTD_AMT_PCT,
M1.CANCEL_PCT,
M1.CANCELLED_AMT_PCT
INTO #T_BTD_CANCEL

FROM #T_BTD_CANCEL_3 A 
LEFT JOIN M1
ON EOMONTH(A.CalendarDate) = EOMONTH(M1.CalendarDate)
AND A.Division  = M1.Division
AND A.BranchID  = M1.BranchID
AND	A.ProductID = M1.ProductID

INSERT INTO [EDW_FCST].[FACT_BTD_CANCEL_NEW]


SELECT 
Division					,
'BY_PRODUCT' AS Identifier	,
CalendarDate				,
BranchID		            ,
ProductID	                ,
BTD_PCT						,
BTD_AMT_PCT					,
CANCEL_PCT					,
CANCELLED_AMT_PCT			,
GETDATE() AS LastUpdatedTS
FROM #T_BTD_CANCEL;

UPDATE A
SET 
A.BTD_PCT			= A.BTD_PCT				+ COALESCE(B.BTD_PCT,0.00)				,
A.BTD_AMT_PCT		= A.BTD_AMT_PCT			+ COALESCE(B.BTD_AMT_PCT,0.00)			,
A.CANCEL_PCT		= A.CANCEL_PCT			+ COALESCE(B.CANCEL_PCT,0.00)			,
A.CANCELLED_AMT_PCT = A.CANCELLED_AMT_PCT	+ COALESCE(B.CANCELLED_AMT_PCT,0.00)

FROM [EDW_FCST].[FACT_BTD_CANCEL_NEW] A 
JOIN 
	(
		SELECT * FROM 
				(
					SELECT *,
					ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY EOMONTH(CalendarDate),Division ORDER BY LastUpdatedTS DESC) AS RW
					FROM  [EDW_FCST].[REF_BTD_CANCEL_MANUAL_OVERRIDE]
					) M1
		WHERE RW=1

		) B

ON	A.Division					= B.Division
AND EOMONTH(A.CalendarDate)		= EOMONTH(B.CalendarDate)

WHERE A.Identifier = 'BY_DIVISION'

--*************************
-- BTD Date Gen
--*************************

SELECT * INTO 
#T_CAL_BTD
FROM 

(
SELECT 
    C1.CalendarDate,
    C2.CalendarDate AS Cal_Date_PRED
FROM 
    EDW.DIM_CALENDAR C1
JOIN 
    EDW.DIM_CALENDAR C2 
    ON C2.CalendarDate BETWEEN DATEADD(DAY, -39, C1.CalendarDate) -- 27 + 13
                             AND DATEADD(DAY, -12, C1.CalendarDate)

	) A1
WHERE CalendarDate>='2019-01-01' AND CalendarDate<='2030-12-31';


--*************************
-- Cancel Date Gen
--*************************


SELECT * INTO 
#T_CAL_CANCEL
FROM 

(
SELECT 
    C1.CalendarDate,
    C2.CalendarDate AS Cal_Date_PRED
FROM 
    EDW.DIM_CALENDAR C1
JOIN 
    EDW.DIM_CALENDAR C2 
    ON C2.CalendarDate BETWEEN DATEADD(DAY, -111, C1.CalendarDate) -- ( 55 + 57 )
                             AND DATEADD(DAY, -56, C1.CalendarDate)

	) A1
WHERE CalendarDate>='2019-01-01' AND CalendarDate<='2030-12-31';



--**********************************************
--############## BTD Cal STARTS HERE ###########
--**********************************************

SELECT 
Identifier,
Division,
CalendarDate,
SUM(BTD_PCT_ROLLUP) AS BTD_PCT ,
SUM(BTD_AMT_PCT_ROLLUP) AS BTD_AMT_PCT
INTO #T_BTD_1

FROM 
(
		SELECT 
		Identifier,
		Division,
		CalendarDate,
		Cal_Date_PRED,
		BTD,
		CANCELLED,
		SOLD,
		SOLD_SUM_PRED,
		SOLD_SUM_PRED_PCT,
		BTD_WGTD_PCT,
		(SOLD_SUM_PRED_PCT * BTD_WGTD_PCT ) AS BTD_PCT_ROLLUP,
		GROSS_SALES,
		GROSS_SALES_SUM_PRED,
		GROSS_SALES_SUM_PRED_PCT,
		(GROSS_SALES_SUM_PRED_PCT * BTD_AMT_WGTD_PCT ) AS BTD_AMT_PCT_ROLLUP
		
		FROM
		(
		
				SELECT 
				Identifier,
				Division,
				CalendarDate,
				Cal_Date_PRED,
				BTD,
				CANCELLED,
				SOLD,
				SOLD_SUM_PRED,
				CASE WHEN SOLD_SUM_PRED=0	THEN 0.000 ELSE	(SOLD * 1.000 / SOLD_SUM_PRED * 1.000) END AS SOLD_SUM_PRED_PCT,
				CASE WHEN SOLD=0			THEN 0.000 ELSE  (BTD * 1.000 / SOLD * 1.000) END AS BTD_WGTD_PCT,
				GROSS_SALES_SUM_PRED,
				GROSS_SALES,
				CASE WHEN GROSS_SALES_SUM_PRED=0	THEN 0.000 ELSE	(GROSS_SALES * 1.000 / GROSS_SALES_SUM_PRED * 1.000) END AS GROSS_SALES_SUM_PRED_PCT,
				CASE WHEN GROSS_SALES=0				THEN 0.000 ELSE  (BTD_AMT * 1.000 / GROSS_SALES * 1.000) END AS BTD_AMT_WGTD_PCT
				
				
				FROM 
				(
				
					SELECT 
					Identifier,
					Division,
					CalendarDate,
					Cal_Date_PRED,
					BTD,
					CANCELLED,
					SOLD,
					SUM(SOLD) OVER (PARTITION BY Identifier,Division,CalendarDate) AS SOLD_SUM_PRED,
					BTD_AMT,
					GROSS_SALES,
					SUM(GROSS_SALES) OVER (PARTITION BY Identifier,Division,CalendarDate) AS GROSS_SALES_SUM_PRED
					
					FROM 
					(
						SELECT 
						CNF.Identifier,
						B.Division,
						A.CalendarDate,
						A.Cal_Date_PRED,
						SUM(B.BTD) 			AS BTD,
						SUM(B.CANCELLED) 	AS CANCELLED,
						SUM(B.SOLD) 		AS SOLD,
						SUM(B.BTD_AMT) 		AS BTD_AMT,
						SUM(B.GROSS_SALES) 	AS GROSS_SALES
						
						FROM #T_CAL_BTD A 						
						JOIN [EDW_FCST].[FACT_SALES_ACTUAL] B
						ON A.Cal_Date_PRED = B.CalendarDate
						
						JOIN (SELECT * FROM [EDW_FCST].[DIM_MARKET_CONFIGURATION] WHERE Identifier NOT LIKE '%_EST' ) CNF 
						ON B.BranchID = CNF.FilterBranch
						
						GROUP BY 
						B.Division,
						A.CalendarDate,
						A.Cal_Date_PRED,
						CNF.Identifier
						
						) M1
						
					) M2
		
				) M3
		
		) M4

GROUP BY 
Identifier,
Division,
CalendarDate;


--**********************************************
--############## BTD Cal ENDS HERE ###########
--**********************************************



--****************************************
-- ######## CANCEL CAL STARTS HERE  ######
--****************************************




SELECT 
Identifier,
Division,
CalendarDate,
SUM(CANCEL_PCT_ROLLUP) 		AS 	CANCEL_PCT ,
SUM(CANCELLED_AMT_ROLLUP) 	AS 	CANCELLED_AMT_PCT 
INTO #T_CANCEL_1

FROM 
(
		SELECT 
		Identifier,
		Division,
		CalendarDate,
		Cal_Date_PRED,
		BTD,
		CANCELLED,
		SOLD,
		SOLD_SUM_PRED,
		SOLD_SUM_PRED_PCT,
		CANCELLED_WGTD_PCT,
		(SOLD_SUM_PRED_PCT * CANCELLED_WGTD_PCT ) AS CANCEL_PCT_ROLLUP,
		GROSS_SALES_SUM_PRED_PCT,
		CANCELLED_AMT_WGTD_PCT,
		(GROSS_SALES_SUM_PRED_PCT * CANCELLED_AMT_WGTD_PCT ) AS CANCELLED_AMT_ROLLUP
		
		FROM
		(
		
				SELECT 
				Identifier,
				Division,
				CalendarDate,
				Cal_Date_PRED,
				BTD,
				CANCELLED,
				SOLD,
				SOLD_SUM_PRED,
				CASE WHEN SOLD_SUM_PRED=0	THEN 0.000 ELSE	(SOLD * 1.000 / SOLD_SUM_PRED * 1.000) END AS SOLD_SUM_PRED_PCT,
				CASE WHEN SOLD=0			THEN 0.000 ELSE  (CANCELLED * 1.000 / SOLD * 1.000) END AS CANCELLED_WGTD_PCT,
				
				CASE WHEN GROSS_SALES_SUM_PRED=0	THEN 0.000 ELSE	(GROSS_SALES * 1.000 / GROSS_SALES_SUM_PRED * 1.000) END AS GROSS_SALES_SUM_PRED_PCT,
				CASE WHEN GROSS_SALES=0			THEN 0.000 ELSE  (CANCELLED_AMT * 1.000 / GROSS_SALES * 1.000) END AS CANCELLED_AMT_WGTD_PCT
				
				FROM 
				(
				
					SELECT 
					Identifier,
					Division,
					CalendarDate,
					Cal_Date_PRED,
					BTD,
					CANCELLED,
					SOLD,
					SUM(SOLD) OVER (PARTITION BY Identifier,Division,CalendarDate) AS SOLD_SUM_PRED,
					GROSS_SALES,
					CANCELLED_AMT,
					SUM(GROSS_SALES) OVER (PARTITION BY Identifier,Division,CalendarDate) AS GROSS_SALES_SUM_PRED
					
					FROM 
					(
						SELECT 
						CNF.Identifier,
						B.Division,
						A.CalendarDate,
						A.Cal_Date_PRED,
						SUM(B.BTD) 			AS BTD,
						SUM(B.CANCELLED) 	AS CANCELLED,
						SUM(B.SOLD) 		AS SOLD,
						SUM(B.CANCELLED_AMT) 	AS CANCELLED_AMT,
						SUM(B.GROSS_SALES) 		AS GROSS_SALES
						
						FROM #T_CAL_CANCEL A 
						JOIN [EDW_FCST].[FACT_SALES_ACTUAL] B
						ON A.Cal_Date_PRED = B.CalendarDate
						
						JOIN (SELECT * FROM [EDW_FCST].[DIM_MARKET_CONFIGURATION] WHERE Identifier NOT LIKE '%_EST' ) CNF 
						ON B.BranchID = CNF.FilterBranch
						
						GROUP BY 
						B.Division,
						A.CalendarDate,
						A.Cal_Date_PRED,
						CNF.Identifier
						) M1
						
					) M2
		
				) M3
		
		) M4

GROUP BY 
Identifier,
Division,
CalendarDate;

--****************************************
-- ######## CANCEL CAL ENDS HERE  ######
--****************************************




--*******************************************
--####### MTD ACTUALS STARTS HERE ##########
--*******************************************

SELECT 
Identifier,
Division,
CalendarDate,

CASE WHEN MTD_SOLD=0		THEN 0.000 ELSE (MTD_BTD * 1.000 / MTD_SOLD * 1.000)					END AS MTD_BTD_PCT_ACT,
CASE WHEN MTD_GROSS_SALES=0 THEN 0.000 ELSE (MTD_BTD_AMT * 1.000 / MTD_GROSS_SALES * 1.000) 		END AS MTD_BTD_AMT_PCT_ACT,

CASE WHEN MTD_SOLD=0 THEN 0.000			ELSE (MTD_CANCELLED * 1.000 / MTD_SOLD * 1.000)				END AS MTD_CANCEL_PCT_ACT,
CASE WHEN MTD_GROSS_SALES=0 THEN 0.000	ELSE (MTD_CANCELLED_AMT * 1.000 / MTD_GROSS_SALES * 1.000)	END AS MTD_CANCEL_AMT_PCT_ACT


INTO #T_MTD_BTD_CANCEL
FROM 
(

	SELECT 
	CNF.Identifier,
	B.Division,
	EOMONTH(B.CalendarDate) AS CalendarDate,
	SUM(B.BTD) 				AS MTD_BTD,
	SUM(B.BTD_AMT) 			AS MTD_BTD_AMT,
	SUM(B.SOLD) 			AS MTD_SOLD,
	SUM(B.CANCELLED) 		AS MTD_CANCELLED,
	SUM(B.CANCELLED_AMT) 	AS MTD_CANCELLED_AMT,
	SUM(B.GROSS_SALES) 	AS MTD_GROSS_SALES
	FROM 			
	[EDW_FCST].[FACT_SALES_ACTUAL] B
	JOIN (SELECT * FROM [EDW_FCST].[DIM_MARKET_CONFIGURATION] WHERE Identifier NOT LIKE '%_EST' ) CNF 
	ON B.BranchID = CNF.FilterBranch

	GROUP BY 
	CNF.Identifier,
	B.Division,
	EOMONTH(B.CalendarDate) 
		
	) M1;

--####### MTD END HERE ##########

--***********************************************************
--######### LONG TERM CANCEL - STARTS HERE ##################
--***********************************************************



WITH CAL AS 

(
	SELECT 
		C.CalendarDate,
		D.Division,
		D.Identifier
	FROM 
		EDW.DIM_CALENDAR C
	CROSS JOIN 
		(
			SELECT 
			DISTINCT Division,
			Identifier
			FROM  [EDW_FCST].[DIM_MARKET_CONFIGURATION]
			WHERE Identifier NOT LIKE '%_EST' 
			
			) D
			
	)


SELECT 
A.Identifier,
A.CalendarDate,
A.Division,
COALESCE(B.LT_Cancel_8WK,0)  		AS Cancel_Count_8WK ,
COALESCE(B.LT_Cancel_16WK,0) 		AS Cancel_Count_16WK,
COALESCE(B.LT_Cancel_8WK_AMT,0)  	AS Cancel_Count_8WK_AMT ,
COALESCE(B.LT_Cancel_16WK_AMT,0)  	AS Cancel_Count_16WK_AMT ,
COALESCE(C.Sold,0) 			 		AS Sold_Count,
COALESCE(C.GrossSales,0)			AS GrossSales

INTO #T_CAN_1

FROM CAL  A
LEFT JOIN	
	
(
	SELECT 
	Identifier,
	Division,
	ContractDate,
	SUM(LT_Cancel_8Week)  AS LT_Cancel_8WK,
	SUM(LT_Cancel_16Week) AS LT_Cancel_16WK,
	SUM(LT_Cancel_8Week_AMT) 	AS LT_Cancel_8WK_AMT,
	SUM(LT_Cancel_16Week_AMT) 	AS LT_Cancel_16WK_AMT
	FROM 
	(
		
		SELECT 
		Identifier,
		LeadID,
		JobID,
		Division,
		ContractDate,
		CancelDate,	
		CASE WHEN DAY_DIFF > 56  AND GrossSales > 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS LT_Cancel_8Week,
		CASE WHEN DAY_DIFF > 112 AND GrossSales > 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS LT_Cancel_16Week,
		CASE WHEN DAY_DIFF > 56  AND GrossSales > 0 THEN GrossSales ELSE 0 END AS LT_Cancel_8Week_AMT,
		CASE WHEN DAY_DIFF > 112 AND GrossSales > 0 THEN GrossSales ELSE 0 END AS LT_Cancel_16Week_AMT
		FROM 
		(	
			SELECT
				CNF.Identifier,
				B.LeadID,
				B.Division,
				a.JobID,
				CAST(A.ContractDate AS DATE) AS ContractDate,
				CAST(A.CancelDate AS DATE) AS CancelDate,
				DATEDIFF(DAY,A.ContractDate,A.CancelDate) AS DAY_DIFF,
				(
					CASE 
						WHEN A.Division IN ('MXH','CTA','SWR') THEN A.GrossAmount ELSE 
							(
								CASE WHEN A.JobNetAmt>0 THEN JobNetAmt ELSE A.GrossAmount END
								) END
						) AS GrossSales
			
				FROM EDW.FACT_LEAD B
				JOIN (SELECT * FROM [EDW_FCST].[DIM_MARKET_CONFIGURATION] WHERE Identifier NOT LIKE '%_EST' ) CNF 
				ON B.BranchID = CNF.FilterBranch
				
				LEFT JOIN EDW.FACT_JOB  A
				ON A.LeadID = B.LeadID
				LEFT JOIN EDW.DIM_JOB_STATUS C
				ON A.JobStatusID = C.JobStatusID
				WHERE UPPER(C.UNI_JOBSTATUSCATEGORY)='CANCELLED' 			
				AND A.CancelDate IS NOT NULL
				AND CAST(A.ContractDate AS DATE) >='2019-01-01'
				

				) M1
			
			) M2
		
		GROUP BY 
		Identifier,
		Division,
		ContractDate
		
	) B 

ON A.CalendarDate = B.ContractDate
AND A.Division = B.Division
AND A.Identifier = B.Identifier

LEFT JOIN 
	(
		SELECT 
			CNF.Identifier,
			B.CalendarDate,
			B.Division,
			SUM(B.Sold) 		AS Sold,
			SUM(B.Gross_Sales) AS GrossSales
			
			FROM [EDW_FCST].[FACT_SALES_ACTUAL] B 
			JOIN (SELECT * FROM [EDW_FCST].[DIM_MARKET_CONFIGURATION] WHERE Identifier NOT LIKE '%_EST' ) CNF 
				ON B.BranchID = CNF.FilterBranch

			GROUP BY 
			B.CalendarDate,
			B.Division,
			CNF.Identifier
		
		) C

ON A.CalendarDate = C.CalendarDate
AND A.Division = C.Division
AND A.Identifier = C.Identifier
 
WHERE A.CalendarDate <= GETDATE() + 6
AND A.CalendarDate >= '2019-01-01';




--***************





SELECT 
Identifier,
CalendarDate,
Division,
Cancel_Count_8WK_Last12to6Months,
Cancel_Count_16WK_Last12to6Months,
Sold_Count_Last12to6Months,
CASE WHEN Sold_Count_Last12to6Months=0 THEN 0 ELSE ( Cancel_Count_8WK_Last12to6Months  * 1.0 / Sold_Count_Last12to6Months * 1.0 ) END AS Cancel_Count_8WK_AVG,
CASE WHEN Sold_Count_Last12to6Months=0 THEN 0 ELSE ( Cancel_Count_16WK_Last12to6Months * 1.0 / Sold_Count_Last12to6Months * 1.0 ) END AS Cancel_Count_16WK_AVG,

CASE WHEN GrossSales_Last12to6Months=0 THEN 0 ELSE ( Cancel_Count_8WK_Last12to6Months_AMT  * 1.0 / GrossSales_Last12to6Months * 1.0 ) END AS Cancel_Count_8WK_AVG_AMT,
CASE WHEN GrossSales_Last12to6Months=0 THEN 0 ELSE ( Cancel_Count_16WK_Last12to6Months_AMT  * 1.0 / GrossSales_Last12to6Months * 1.0 ) END AS Cancel_Count_16WK_AVG_AMT

INTO #T_LT_CANCEL

FROM 
(
	SELECT 
		A.Identifier,
		A.CalendarDate,
		A.Division,
		SUM(B.Cancel_Count_8WK) 		AS Cancel_Count_8WK_Last12to6Months,
		SUM(B.Cancel_Count_16WK) 		AS Cancel_Count_16WK_Last12to6Months,
		
		SUM(B.Cancel_Count_8WK_AMT) 	AS Cancel_Count_8WK_Last12to6Months_AMT,
		SUM(B.Cancel_Count_16WK_AMT) 	AS Cancel_Count_16WK_Last12to6Months_AMT,
		
		SUM(B.Sold_Count) 				AS Sold_Count_Last12to6Months,
		SUM(B.GrossSales) 				AS GrossSales_Last12to6Months
		
	FROM #T_CAN_1 A
	LEFT JOIN #T_CAN_1 B
		ON B.Division = A.Division
		AND A.Identifier = B.Identifier
		
	AND B.CalendarDate BETWEEN DATEFROMPARTS(YEAR(DATEADD(MONTH, -12, A.CalendarDate)), MONTH(DATEADD(MONTH, -12, A.CalendarDate)), 1) -- First Day of Month
							AND EOMONTH(DATEADD(MONTH, -6, A.CalendarDate))  -- Last Day of Month
	GROUP BY A.CalendarDate, A.Division,A.Identifier
	
	) M1 

WHERE CalendarDate >= '2022-01-01'
AND CalendarDate <= GETDATE() + 6
AND CalendarDate <= EOMONTH( GETDATE());

--######### LONG TERM CANCEL - ENDS HERE ##################
--***********************************************************



--**************************************************************************************
--######### LONG TERM CANCEL ADJUSTMENT TO BTD & CANCEL - STARTS HERE ##################
--**************************************************************************************

-- LT Adjustment to Cancel

SELECT 
A.Identifier,
A.Division,
A.CalendarDate,
CASE WHEN A.Division ='RTW' THEN A.CANCEL_PCT ELSE (A.CANCEL_PCT + COALESCE(B.Cancel_Count_8Wk_AVG,0) ) END AS CANCEL_PCT,
CASE WHEN A.Division ='RTW' THEN A.CANCELLED_AMT_PCT ELSE (A.CANCELLED_AMT_PCT  + COALESCE(B.Cancel_Count_16Wk_AVG_AMT,0)) END AS CANCELLED_AMT_PCT

--(A.CANCEL_PCT + COALESCE(B.Cancel_Count_8Wk_AVG,0) ) AS CANCEL_PCT ,
--(A.CANCELLED_AMT_PCT  + COALESCE(B.Cancel_Count_16Wk_AVG_AMT,0)) AS CANCELLED_AMT_PCT
INTO #T_CANCEL_2
FROM #T_CANCEL_1 A 
LEFT JOIN #T_LT_CANCEL B 
ON A.CalendarDate = B.CalendarDate
AND A.Division = B.Division
AND A.Identifier = B.Identifier;



-- BTD and Cancel Combined 

SELECT 
A.Identifier,
A.Division,
A.CalendarDate,
A.BTD_PCT ,
A.BTD_AMT_PCT,
COALESCE(B.CANCEL_PCT,0.0000) AS CANCEL_PCT,
COALESCE(B.CANCELLED_AMT_PCT,0.0000) AS CANCELLED_AMT_PCT,

C.MTD_BTD_PCT_ACT,
C.MTD_BTD_AMT_PCT_ACT,
C.MTD_CANCEL_PCT_ACT,
C.MTD_CANCEL_AMT_PCT_ACT

INTO #T_BTD_CANCEL_COMBINED_LT_ADJUSTED

FROM #T_BTD_1 A 
LEFT JOIN #T_CANCEL_2 B 
ON A.CalendarDate = B.CalendarDate
AND A.Division = B.Division
AND A.Identifier = B.Identifier 

LEFT JOIN #T_MTD_BTD_CANCEL C 
ON  EOMONTH(A.CalendarDate) 	= EOMONTH(C.CalendarDate)
AND A.Division 					= C.Division
AND A.Identifier				= C.Identifier

WHERE A.CalendarDate <= GETDATE()+6
AND A.CalendarDate <= EOMONTH(GETDATE());



--**************************************************************************************
--######### LONG TERM CANCEL ADJUSTMENT TO BTD & CANCEL - STARTS HERE ##################
--**************************************************************************************


--*******************************



SELECT 
Identifier,
Division,
CalendarDate,
CASE WHEN BTD_IND=1 THEN MTD_BTD_PCT_ACT		ELSE BTD_PCT		END AS BTD_PCT, 
CASE WHEN BTD_IND=1 THEN MTD_BTD_AMT_PCT_ACT	ELSE BTD_AMT_PCT	END AS BTD_AMT_PCT, 

CASE WHEN CANCEL_IND=1 THEN MTD_CANCEL_PCT_ACT		ELSE CANCEL_PCT		END AS CANCEL_PCT, 
CASE WHEN CANCEL_IND=1 THEN MTD_CANCEL_AMT_PCT_ACT	ELSE CANCELLED_AMT_PCT	END AS CANCELLED_AMT_PCT

INTO #T_BTD_CANCEL_3

FROM
(
	
				SELECT 
				Identifier,
				Division,
				CalendarDate,
				MTD_BTD_PCT_ACT,
				MTD_BTD_AMT_PCT_ACT,
				MTD_CANCEL_PCT_ACT,
				MTD_CANCEL_AMT_PCT_ACT,
				BTD_PCT,
				BTD_AMT_PCT,
				CANCEL_PCT,
				CANCELLED_AMT_PCT,
				CASE WHEN BTD_PCT < MTD_BTD_PCT_ACT AND DAY(CalendarDate) > 12 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS BTD_Ind,
				CASE WHEN CANCEL_PCT < MTD_CANCEL_PCT_ACT AND DAY(CalendarDate) > 12 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS Cancel_Ind
				FROM  #T_BTD_CANCEL_COMBINED_LT_ADJUSTED
				--WHERE CalendarDate>='2025-06-01' AND Division = 'FHI' 
				

		) M2;



--******************************


WITH M1 AS
(
	SELECT  
	Identifier,
	Division,
	CalendarDate,
	BTD_PCT,
	BTD_AMT_PCT,
	CANCEL_PCT,
	CANCELLED_AMT_PCT
	FROM #T_BTD_CANCEL_3 
	WHERE CalendarDate=CAST(GETDATE() +1 AS DATE)

	UNION ALL

	SELECT  
	Identifier,
	Division,
	CalendarDate,
	BTD_PCT,
	BTD_AMT_PCT,
	CANCEL_PCT,
	CANCELLED_AMT_PCT
	FROM #T_BTD_CANCEL_3 
	WHERE CalendarDate<=EOMONTH(DATEADD(MONTH,-1,CAST(GETDATE() +1 AS DATE)))
	AND CalendarDate = EOMONTH(CalendarDate)
	--AND Division='FHI'

	)

SELECT 
A.Identifier,
A.Division,
A.CalendarDate,
M1.BTD_PCT,
M1.BTD_AMT_PCT,
M1.CANCEL_PCT,
M1.CANCELLED_AMT_PCT
INTO #T_BTD_CANCEL

FROM #T_BTD_CANCEL_3 A 
LEFT JOIN M1
ON EOMONTH(A.CalendarDate) = EOMONTH(M1.CalendarDate)
AND A.Division = M1.Division
AND A.Identifier = M1.Identifier;




--**************************************************************************************
--######### LONG TERM CANCEL ADJUSTMENT TO BTD & CANCEL - ENDS HERE ##################
--**************************************************************************************



INSERT INTO [EDW_FCST].[FACT_BTD_CANCEL_NEW]

SELECT 
A.Division					,
A.Identifier	,
A.CalendarDate				,
B.BranchID		,
CONCAT(A.DIVISION,'-')		AS ProductID	,
A.BTD_PCT						,
A.BTD_AMT_PCT					,
A.CANCEL_PCT					,
A.CANCELLED_AMT_PCT			,
GETDATE() AS LastUpdatedTS
FROM #T_BTD_CANCEL A
LEFT JOIN (SELECT DISTINCT Identifier,BranchID  FROM [EDW_FCST].[DIM_MARKET_CONFIGURATION] WHERE Identifier NOT LIKE '%_EST' ) B
ON A.Identifier = B.Identifier
